Description:
At Royal Blue India, we bring nature closer to you with our exclusive collection of premium orchid plants and indoor greens. Our mission is to make every home and workspace more beautiful, peaceful, and vibrant through quality plants and easy home delivery services.

We offer a wide variety of orchid colors and species, carefully nurtured to ensure healthy growth and long-lasting blooms. Along with orchids, we also provide plant accessories, hangers, and pots to help you create your perfect green corner.

Whether you’re decorating your balcony, gifting someone special, or adding freshness to your office, Royal Blue India is your trusted partner for all plant needs — affordable, elegant, and delivered with care.

Name: Electric City Aquarium & Reptile Den
Description:
Upon entering, you’ll be transported to an enchanting world where you can explore both land and sea. Our aquarium and reptile den provide a myriad of opportunities to learn about the amphibians, reptiles, mammals and aquatic creatures with which we share the earth.

Electric City Aquarium & Reptile Den is a privately owned aquarium that is open to the public.

Name: Monteverde Butterfly Gardens
Description: Monteverde Butterfly Gardens have been sharing our incredible planet with visitors from around the world for over 30 years! Our international interns learn about science translation and entomology sharing what they learn with our guests!

Name: SERRE DE LA MADONE
Description:
Une oasis botanique née d’un rêve anglais, enracinée en Méditerranée.

Nichée sur les hauteurs de Menton, à l’abri des regards et du tumulte, la Serre de la Madone est bien plus qu’un jardin. C’est un écrin vivant, façonné avec sensibilité par le botaniste Lawrence Johnston, visionnaire du XXe siècle.

Pensé comme une œuvre d’auteur, ce jardin en terrasses conjugue raffinement paysager, biodiversité acclimatée et architecture végétale subtile.

Son agencement en terrasses, ses niches écologiques, ses espèces venues d’Afrique, d’Asie, d’Amérique du Sud ou de Méditerranée en font un refuge de biodiversité unique sur la Riviera.

Classé Monument Historique, labellisé Jardin Remarquable et reconnu site emblématique de la région PACA par la Mission Stéphane Bern, ce patrimoine vivant entre aujourd’hui dans une nouvelle ère de renaissance, guidée par des engagements forts : préserver, transmettre, réenchanter.



 Menton | Jardin Botanique de Lawrence Johnston
 Monument Historique – Jardin Remarquable
 Visites & événements
 Soutenez sa restauration

 𝒱𝑒𝓃𝑒𝓏 𝓁𝑒 𝒹é𝒸𝑜𝓊𝓋𝓇𝒾𝓇. 𝒜𝒾𝒹𝑒𝓏-𝓃𝑜𝓊𝓈 à 𝓁𝑒 𝓅𝓇é𝓈𝑒𝓇𝓋𝑒𝓇 !
 Visite : www.serredelamadone.fr
 Faire un don : https://opn.to/a/bZk62R

Name: Wilhelma Zoologisch-Botanischer Garten Stuttgart
Description: Wilhelma is the only zoological and botanical garden in Germany and one of the most species-rich zoos in the world.

Name: Monk Botanical Gardens
Description:
Monk Botanical Gardens operates a public botanical garden and provides associated educational, recreational, and social activities for the region. The Gardens cultivates well-being in people, communities, and the environment with experiences that engage, educate, and inspire.  

In just a few short years, the Monk Botanical Gardens has grown into an exciting community attraction. “I can remember going to a planning meeting there with a guest garden design consultant in 2010, ” says a former board member. “We sat on the grass; there was literally nothing there.”

Not so today. Visitors to the Gardens can relax in the contemplative environment of the Memory Garden and Memorial Plaza, climb the magnificent Treehouse, bring lunch and enjoy it under the roof at the “Potager” pavilion in the Kitchen Garden, view unusual plantings in the Meditation Garden, and explore the foot trails that wind through the fields and woods, and border the pond.

These features are just the start of what, in time, will be one of the most picturesque botanical gardens in the region, if not the state. And it’s all because of volunteers and donors—who have pitched in with expertise and funds to grow the Gardens to its present state.

Located at 1901 N. Fourth Ave. on Wausau’s west side, on 29 acres (19 acres first generously donated by the Robert W. Monk family), the Gardens has become an urban sanctuary for education, appreciation of our environment, relaxation and recreation. “What an absolutely awesome place…a magical escape into nature…” wrote one visitor on Facebook recently.

See our classes and programs for adults and children at our programs page
Learn more about the specific Gardens and special features by going to the Visit section.
Find out how to volunteer, become a member, or donate at the Get Involved section.
Most of all…come out for a pleasant adventure through Monk Botanical Gardens!

Name: El Paraiso Animal Shelter
Description:
We are saving street cats and dogs from the harsh conditions they are living in, and giving them a better future. We pay for everything ourselves so any donations are more than welcome. We are expanding and building a new cat enclosure, so any donations go directly to the construction as well to veterinary bills, we do not keep any surplus for ourselves. For donations please visit https://www.gofundme.com/f/building-cat-dogshelter or
PayPal: https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=AQPTECYG388NW

Name: PARCO ZOO FALCONARA
Description:
Il PARCO ZOO FALCONARA è un moderno giardino zoologico situato nel comune di Falconara Marittima, in provincia di Ancona.
Fondato nel 1968, si estende per circa 60.000 mq su una bella collina che si alza di fronte al mare.
Ospita circa 200 esemplari appartenenti a diverse specie tra Mammiferi, Uccelli e Rettili.
Lo Zoo è membro dell’Unione Italiana Zoo e Acquari (UIZA) e dell’Associazione Europea Zoo e Acquari (European Association of Zoos and Aquaria – EAZA).
Il Parco partecipa ai Programmi Europei per le specie minacciate di estinzione (EEP), collabora a progetti di ricerca con università italiane e sostiene campagne di conservazione a favore di specie a rischio estinzione, degli habitat in cui esse vivono e dello sviluppo sostenibile delle comunità locali.

Name: Green Paper Morocco
Description:
green Paper Morocco propose des solutions écoresponsables qui marient originalité et durabilité.
De nos papiers à planter à nos supports uniques, chaque création est pensée pour valoriser vos actions et vos engagements, tout en laissant une empreinte positive et durable sur l’environnement.

Name: Green Aura Tn
Description: Vente de plantes ornementales, accessoires et fournitures de jardin

Name: Crystal Springs Rhododendron Garden
Description:
Crystal Springs Rhododendron Garden is a sanctuary of tranquil beauty for the wellbeing of all. Inspiring joy, curiosity and replenishment in a serene rhododendron garden in Portland, Oregon.

The garden is a public - private partnership between the Portland Chapter of the American Rhododendron Society and the City of Portland's Parks and Recreation Bureau.

Name: European Professional Zookeeper Qualification Framework
Description:
Zookeeper training opportunities vary greatly across Europe. While some countries have standardised formal qualifications, resources and standardised training opportunities are lacking in many other countries. This has resulted in a clear skills gap in professional zookeeping in many European countries.

The goal of the EPZQF project is to develop a European Professional Zookeeper Qualification Framework identifying the key competencies required to be a professional zookeeper working in an EU zoo, and to design several training modules to help staff reach the expected competency levels.

The EPZQF project is co-funded by the Erasmus+ programme of the European Union.

Name: Wow Groupe
Description:
Le Groupe WOW regroupe 3 parcs animaliers : WOW Safari Thoiry (Yvelines), près de Paris, WOW Safari Peaugres (Ardèche) près de Lyon et WILD PARK Santo Inácio près de Porto au Portugal.
 Depuis sa création, le Groupe invite ses visiteurs à appréhender la beauté et la fragilité de l’environnement qui les entoure de manière ludique, éducative et responsable.

Name: Natural'Parc
Description:
Situé entre Nantes, Angers et Cholet, Natural’Parc vous invite à vivre une journée unique, entre parc animalier et parc de loisirs. Partez à la rencontre de nombreux animaux évoluant en semi-liberté, pour une immersion au plus près de la nature.

Le parc offre également une grande variété d’activités pour tous les âges : tyroliennes dans les cimes, trampoline géant dans les arbres, balade aérienne, descente en bouée ou encore courses de karts à pédales, jeu de piste, toupie infernale, toboggans, structures gonflables… À noter qu’un espace de jeux est dédié aux tout-petits de 0 à 3 ans. 

Pour les plus curieux, Natural’Parc propose un jeu de piste tout au long de votre parcours, ainsi qu’une énigme à résoudre dans le labyrinthe géant dans un champ de maïs.

Que vous veniez en famille ou entre amis, Natural’Parc vous garantit une sortie originale et ludique, à mi-chemin entre nature, animaux, découverte et aventure.
Location: Orée d'Anjou, Pays de la Loire

Name: Zoo du Bassin d’Arcachon
Description:
Avec plus de 1 000 animaux, 22 ha de forêt et plus de 4 km de visite, le zoo du Bassin d'Arcachon est l'un des plus grands zoos de la Nouvelle Aquitaine!
Vous pourrez admirer plus de 150 espèces rares et emblématiques.
Durant la saison, de nombreuses animations vous attendent, des nourrissages ludiques et pédagogiques pour toute la famille.
Des événements pour sensibiliser les visiteurs aux enjeux de la conservation des espèces sont aussi organisés chaque année.
Situé à seulement 5 minutes de la dune du Pilat et à 1 heure de Bor-deaux, le parc est facilement ac-cessible.

Name: Les Amis du Zoo de Mulhouse
Description:
Bienvenue chez Les Amis du Zoo de Mulhouse !

Notre association a pour mission de soutenir activement le Parc zoologique et botanique de Mulhouse dans ses actions en faveur de la conservation, de la recherche et de l’éducation à la biodiversité. Passionnés par le monde animal et végétal, nous nous engageons aux côtés du zoo pour préserver les espèces menacées, améliorer le bien-être des animaux et sensibiliser le public à l’importance de la nature en finançant, entre autres, des collections végétales.

Sur cette page, vous découvrirez nos projets, nos actions, ainsi que les différentes façons de nous rejoindre ou de nous soutenir. Que vous soyez curieux, donateur ou simplement amoureux des animaux, vous êtes ici chez vous !

Name: Plantistan
Description: we provide different varieties of plants indoor & outdoor with all the support and services including after sales services.

Name: Caldwell Zoo
Description: The Caldwell Zoo employs a wide variety of skilled and dedicated professionals to keep the zoo running efficiently and safely while being a positive resource for our guests. We take great pride in the experience and longevity of our team and the quality of service we provide to the visitors. Occasionally, there is turnover in the staff and there are opportunities for responsible and dependable pros to join our team.

Name: Global Wildlife Center
Description: The Global Wildlife Center is one of the largest free-roaming wildlife preserves of its kind in the country! We are located in Folsom, Louisiana and are home to over 2000 exotic, endangered, and threatened animals from all over the world. We are committed to fostering education and interest in wildlife conservation to all ages.

Name: ZOO DE LABENNE (40530)
Description: Sur la côte sud des Landes, à 20 mn de Bayonne et d’Hossegor, le Zoo de Labenne, îlot de nature niché au cœur de la forêt landaise et à deux pas de l’océan présente plus de 300 animaux de 60 espèces dans un cadre naturel de 5 hectares. Loups, lynx, lémuriens, perroquets, suricates, zèbres, flamants, grues, mangoustes, servals …

Name: Butterfly Wonderland
Description:
Butterfly Wonderland is the largest indoor butterfly conservatory in America and widely regarded as one of the “Top Things To Do in Arizona”. The magnificent glass conservatory provides the ideal tropical rainforest habitat for thousands of butterflies from around the world to fly freely. Setting the stage before guests enter the conservatory is a 3D movie chronicling the amazing journey of the monarch butterfly, followed by a tour through the Emergence Gallery where guests are inches away from live chrysalis as they emerge into beautiful butterflies. Along with the butterflies, guests have the chance to see other rainforest animals such as insects and spiders in the Spineless Giants Gallery, colorful and exotic fish in the Tropical Waters Gallery, and unique reptiles and amphibians in the Rainforest Reptiles Gallery. 

Butterfly Wonderland is located at Arizona Boardwalk, Scottsdale’s one-of-a-kind entertainment destination that features nine marquee attractions – OdySea Aquarium, Butterfly Wonderland, UFO Experience, Ripley’s Believe It or Not!, Laser + Mirror Maze, Museum of Illusions, Pangaea Land of the Dinosaurs, Cyber Quest and Johnny’s Playground – in addition to multiple dining, shopping, and amusement venues. The outdoor courtyard regularly hosts a variety of free events and family entertainment throughout the year. Parking is free and there is no admission required to enter Arizona Boardwalk. Arizona Boardwalk is located at 9500 E. Via de Ventura, Scottsdale, AZ 85256, within the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, and is part of the Talking Stick Entertainment District.

Name: Zoo Heidelberg
Description: Der Zoo Heidelberg ist mehr als ein Ausflugsziel. Wir sind ein moderner, wissenschaftlich geführter Zoo mit klarer Mission: Als Kompetenzzentrum für Artenvielfalt und Bildung schaffen wir für rund 500.000 Besucher jährlich  einen lebendigen Ort der Begegnung zwischen Mensch und Tier – und das mitten in der Stadt. Darüber hinaus leisten wir aktiven Artenschutz, direkt vor der Haustür und weltweit. Unsere Zoo-Akademie mit eigenem Technik- und Lernlabor sowie verschiedenen Ausstellungen rund um das Thema Tiere und Natur fördert Umweltbildung auf allen Ebenen. Gemeinsam gestalten wir eine nachhaltige Zukunft.

Name: Jardin botanique de l'Université de Bordeaux
Description:
Le Jardin botanique, qui jouxte le Parc Peixotto, est un lieu créé en 1886 par la Faculté de médecine et de pharmacie de Bordeaux. Il entretient à la fois des 𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝘃𝗶𝘃𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘀 (2000 espèces) et 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗲𝘀 (herbiers, droguiers…). Il constitue chaque année un 𝐼𝑛𝑑𝑒𝑥 𝑠𝑒𝑚𝑖𝑛𝑢𝑚, catalogue de semences échangées avec les institutions botaniques du monde entier.

Une partie est accessible au grand public toute l’année, comprenant l'Arboretum, les Plates-bandes thématiques (collections de Cypéracées, Malvacées, Convolvulacées…) et la Pièce d'eau.
La partie restante est accessible à un public limité sur demande : étudiants, associations et professionnels de la santé et du monde végétal. Elle comporte l’Enclos pharmaceutique, l’Orangerie, les Serres Chaude et Tempérée, ainsi que le Laboratoire d’enseignement.
Le JB abrite aussi la Maison du Développement Durable de la ville de Talence, au sein de son Petit Laboratoire.

Le JB poursuit 3 missions principales.
L’𝗲𝗻𝘀𝗲𝗶𝗴𝗻𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 : le JB répond à des besoins pédagogiques précis, notamment des enseignements de Pharmacie.  La plupart des cours de botanique ont lieu sur place : anatomie, histologie, floristique…
La 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗰𝗵𝗲 : grâce à l’enrichissement des collections et à sa diversité, le JB permet de mieux comprendre la chimie des plantes et leurs potentielles applications.
La 𝗺𝗲́𝗱𝗶𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 : le JB organise des visites lors de journées thématiques (JEP, Mai Talençais...) et met en œuvre des projets en collaboration avec différentes institutions afin de sensibiliser les publics à la diversité végétale, à l’importance des jardins botaniques, au rôle des collections patrimoniales…

Le renouvellement de l'agrément « 𝗝𝗮𝗿𝗱𝗶𝗻 𝗕𝗼𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗱𝗲 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗲𝘁 𝗱𝗲𝘀 𝗣𝗮𝘆𝘀 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗼𝗽𝗵𝗼𝗻𝗲𝘀 » début 2024 est une reconnaissance de l’engagement fort de l’équipe du JB dans ces missions ainsi que pour sa conservation.

𝑒𝑣𝑎.𝑝𝑒𝑡𝑖𝑡@𝑢-𝑏𝑜𝑟𝑑𝑒𝑎𝑢𝑥.𝑓𝑟

Name: FBI (Flowers Best Interest) BV
Description: B

Name: Hoo Zoo and Dinosaur World
Description: Hoo Zoo and Dinosaur World is a small family run zoo located on the outskirts of Telford. It offers a fun day out for all the family with a strong message about conservation.

Name: Zoo2U Discovery Centre
Description:
Zoo2U is now the outreach arm of Holmes Chapel Zoo Limited. We have a passion for educating children and adults about wildlife. We have a strong focus on conserving the world around us and have supported a variety of conservation programs over the years, such as for British native Hedgehogs and the Lion Guardians in Africa. 

We have an outstanding educational program which is curriculum based, supporting learning and bringing topics to life with the use of live animals. Our outreach services are well known and popular, offering packages for all ages and abilities. We have a wonderful collection of animals such as snakes, tenrecs, owls and invertebrates. Each species has been chosen specifically for their role in our education programs and are carefully trained and handled, making them comfortable around humans and resulting in a really close encounter with clients. 

Feel free to get in touch and find out more about a visit to see our beautiful animals.

Name: Bouquet Gardens
Description:
Founded in 1948, Bouquet started as a small family flower shop in Horch Tabet, Lebanon selling green goods, decorating events and weddings all over the country.
Today, our mission is to provide our customers with the best products and services for every occasion and we are currently working towards a greener and cleaner future by reducing plastic waste and encouraging others to plant and hopefully reduce the impact of deforestation.

Name: Zoa parc, jardin animalier et botanique de Sanary-sur-mer
Description: Le parc animalier et botanique de Sanary c’est avant tout 70 ans d’histoire et de passion. Venez découvrir au fil des allées ombragées cet environnement singulier où se mêlent plantes exotiques et méditerranéennes, faune des 5 continents et animaux domestiques.

Name: Kruckeberg Botanic Garden Foundation
Description:
This four-acre public garden contains a unique blend of Pacific Northwest native plants and unusual exotics set in a naturalistic wooded setting. It may take multiple visits to see the more than 2,000 species, which include native and exotic conifers, hardwoods, rhododendrons, magnolias, ferns and groundcovers. Several trees are the largest or most rare in the state. Birdwatchers have identified more than 40 bird species while visiting the Garden.

Located in Shoreline, Washington, the Garden was founded in 1958 by Dr. Arthur Kruckeberg and his wife Mareen, botanists and horticulturalists who amassed the plant collection over 50 years in the gardens surrounding their home.

In 2008, the Garden became part of the City of Shoreline’s park system, preserving it for generations of public enjoyment. Operation and maintenance of the Garden are the responsibility of the Kruckeberg Botanic Garden Foundation, a nonprofit organization, in collaboration with the City of Shoreline.

Kruckeberg also operates the on-site MsK Nursery, which carries native plants and hardy exotics that are well suited for a Northwest garden. All nursery sales and memberships support Garden operations and programming.

The Garden is open to the public year-round on Fridays, Saturdays and Sundays.

Name: Wound Dressing Market
Description: At Wound Dressing Market, we are the leading source of market intelligence and strategic analysis for the global wound care industry. Our mission is to provide medical device manufacturers, healthcare providers, and investors with the critical data and expert insights needed to navigate the complex and evolving landscape of wound management.

Name: Yorkshire Wildlife Park Education
Description: Yorkshire Wildlife Parks 'Wild Education' team welcome over 80,000 education visits a year. As well as being able to explore the park and admire animals such as the critically endangered Amur leopard and the largest collection of polar bears in the UK we also offer a range of hands on, interactive education sessions.

Name: BUTTERFLY ARC S.R.L.
Description:
La Butterfly Arc è la prima Casa delle Farfalle in Italia, nata nel 1988 dal sogno e dai sacrifici di una coppia di giovani naturalisti, Enzo Moretto e Gabriella Tamino, e dalla loro idea di ricreare uno spazio in cui immergersi nella natura,
circondati dal volo delle più belle farfalle del nostro pianeta. La nostra realtà è cresciuta, e la nostra famiglia pure: ne fanno oggi parte anche i figli Lara e Marco, pronti a proteggere ed innovare ogni giorno questo “primogenito” così speciale, preservandone gelosamente l’anima.
La mission della Butterfly Arc è far conoscere a tutti le straordinarie meraviglie della natura ed in particolare lo spettacolare mondo degli insetti e degli altri invertebrati. La nostra struttura promuove inoltre la didattica e la ricerca in campo entomologico, stimolando così la cultura della sostenibilità e la protezione della biodiversità, in accordo con i principi espressi nella Conferenza delle Nazioni Unite di Rio del 1992.

Name: JARDINERIA VILLANUEVA SL
Description: Jardinería Villanueva s.l proyecta, construye y conserva jardines públicos y privados, paredes y cubiertas ajardinadas.

Name: Monkey World - Ape Rescue Centre
Description:
This internationally-acclaimed ape rescue centre is set within 65 acres of beautiful Dorset woodland.  Opened in 1987 to provide abused Spanish beach chimpanzees with a permanent home, the site is now a sanctuary for primates from across the globe. Many have been neglected, kept in unnatural conditions or experienced unbelievable cruelty.  Some are now part of international breeding programmes for endangered species.  At Monkey World, they can all enjoy the company of their own kind in a safe, natural environment.
Monkey World was originally set up by Jim Cronin, MBE who sadly passed away in 2007.  Today, his wife, Dr Alison Cronin, MBE, continues to work with foreign governments worldwide to stop the illegal smuggling of primates from Africa, Asia and South America. 
With over 250 primates of 25 different species, Monkey World is the largest ape and monkey rescue centre in the world.
Monkey World is funded by visitors to the park - and is a fantastic day out! The park is imaginatively laid out and has food and drink outlets, picnic areas, a woodland walk, and a lot of monkey antics to be enjoyed by visitors of all ages.  
Combining fun with conservation and animal education, half-hourly talks at the park explain all about man’s closest living relative.  Visitors can see the stars of TV’s ‘Monkey Life’, then ‘monkey around’ in the south’s largest Great Ape Play Area for children with its huge variety of swings, slides, and climbing frames.

Name: Parc Zoologique et des Loisirs la Concorde Civile PZLCC
Description: Etablissement public de wilaya, à caractère industriel et commercial de loisirs, attraction et Zoo

Name: Second Chance Animal Rescue
Description:
Our vision is a world where every animal is free from harm and can lead a safe, happy and healthy life.

To do this we rescue, rehabilitate and rehome animals in need, providing a safe place for animals of all shapes and sizes without a home. 
All animals that come to us are cared for by our team of dedicated volunteers who work to find them a new, forever home or rehabilitate them back to the wild.  
We believe that every animal has the right to live a healthy, happy life so never put a fit, healthy animal to sleep, and if they can't be found a permanent home then they will live the remainder of their lives with us at the rescue.

We are committed to promoting good animal welfare and responsible pet ownership, working to improve the lives of the animals and people in our community. We work with local partners such as schools, businesses and communities and attend a variety of events to raise awareness of the needs of animals and the work that we do.

Name: Zoo Rostock
Description:
Willkommen im Zoologischen Garten Rostock – dem größten Zoo an der deutschen Ostseeküste. Mit jährlich mehr als 500.000 Besuchenden zählen wir zu den führenden Freizeiteinrichtungen in Mecklenburg-Vorpommern. Unsere einzigartige Parklandschaft beherbergt 6.500 Tiere aus 500 verschiedenen Arten. 
Für das Wohl unserer Besuchenden und der uns anvertrauten Tiere sind täglich 150 Mitarbeitende im Einsatz. Ob Tierpflege, Gärtnerei, Kasse oder Umweltbildung – im Zoo Rostock bieten wir vielfältige Karrieremöglichkeiten.

Name: Rutland Sanctuary Zoo
Description:
Rutland Sanctuary Zoo under new management since September 2020. 
We are a small community zoo with big ideas.
We champion education and ethical standards of husbandry both within the zoo and outside.

Name: Jax Conservation Leaders Collective
Description: The Conservation Leaders Collective (CLC) at Jacksonville Zoo and Gardens unites young professionals (21-40) to drive conservation efforts, build connections, and support the Zoo’s mission through impactful experiences.

Name: Delta Sensory Gardens Carlow
Description: Delta Sensory Gardens - ‘An Oasis of Peace and Tranquillity’, 'A Hidden Secret', and 'Sensory Delight' are just some of the many lovely descriptions of our highly acclaimed, award winning gardens set on 2.5 acres with a series of 16 interconnecting gardens to beckon you with bright and beautiful blooms.  'Unexpected Wonderland' have also been used by visitors to Delta but when you do find us; (R93 Y959); Stroll and admire each luscious garden; listen to the dulcet sounds; touch, feel and smell the beautiful array of flowers, plants and trees; enjoy the unique sculptures and bask in the tranquil babble of the many wonderous water features throughout the gardens. We are confident you will feel your visit rewarding, uplifting, inspirational and repeatable. Before you go, refuel with tasty treats from the delightfully colourful and spacious Café Thyme, perhaps pick up some plants to bring home from our Garden Centre or something pretty from our local "Arts & Gifts" selection. Our Gardens and Café are fully wheelchair accessible catering for individuals, families, groups, bus tours and school trips.

Name: Lafcadio Hearn Japanese Gardens
Description:
These Authentic Japanese Gardens are set in the beautiful seaside town of Tramore, County Waterford, Ireland. These stunning gardens reflect the life and extensive wanderings of Patrick Lafcadio Hearn (Koizumi Yakumo), who grew up in Ireland, and whose life journey embraced several parts of the world. The gardens pay homage to the fame he attained in Japan through his incomparable literary descriptions of the people, customs and culture of that country.

These gardens tell the intriguing and unique story of the life journey of Lafcadio Hearn. In their style and planting they reflect elements of the gardening traditions of the countries and cultures traversed by Hearn during his varied life. The journey begins in a Victorian Garden which commemorate Hearn’s happy childhood summers in Tramore. Later there is an American Garden and a Greek Garden, followed by a series of Japanese inspired landscapes. Having passed beneath a Fujidana, you will soon reach a traditional Japanese Tea House and Tea Garden; followed by a Stream Garden which leads to ponds and a waterfall and an extensive woodland area.

The main elements of design, in particular the use of rocks and water and the plant selection, are influenced by the tradition of a Japanese Strolling Garden. The 2.5 acre gardens are set on a hillside overlooking the dramatic sweep of Tramore Bay. Visitors are introduced to aspects of Japanese folklore through several stories written and translated by Lafcadio Hearn. These include The Cave of the Children’s Ghosts, and the legend of Urashima Taro.

Children are introduced to these magical gardens through a special children’s discovery trail, secret pathways, woodlands and Lafcadio Hearn’s fairytales and folklore.

Lafcadio Hearn Japanese Gardens Tramore is a Not for Profit Community Project and is overseen by Lafcadio Hearn Japanese Gardens CLG

Name: Angie Cormier
Description: For an off the beaten path, quirky and colourful tourism destination, visit the Bottle Houses. Three fairy-like houses built from 25,000 colourful recycled bottles surrounded by exquisite gardens and nature.

Name: ZOO Malkia Park
Description:
Malkia Park – ZOO, ktorá chráni tých, ktorí by v prírode neprežili. Sme zoologická záhrada s výnimočným poslaním: poskytujeme dôstojný domov zvieratám, ktoré by vo voľnej prírode nemali šancu prežiť. Zachraňujeme, vzdelávame a inšpirujeme. Naši obyvatelia sú najmä veľké mačkovité šelmy z nevhodných podmienok, ale aj mnoho ďalších druhov, ktorým dávame druhú šancu. Venujeme sa ochrane biodiverzity, environmentálnej edukácii aj rozvoju pozitívneho vzťahu k zvieratám – srdcom aj činmi. Od roku 2022 máme štatút zoologickej záhrady. Spolupracujeme s odborníkmi, hľadáme partnerstvá a stále rastieme. Veríme, že aj zvieratá s ťažkým osudom si zaslúžia bezpečný a láskavý domov.

Malkia Park – A ZOO that protects those who wouldn’t survive in the wild. We are a zoological garden with a unique mission: to provide a dignified and safe home for animals that can no longer live in the wild. We rescue, educate, and inspire. Our residents include mostly big cats from inappropriate conditions, but also many other species that have been given a second chance. We are dedicated to biodiversity conservation, environmental education, and building a compassionate relationship between people and animals. Since 2022, we officially hold the status of a zoological garden. We work with experts, seek meaningful partnerships, and continue to grow. We believe that even animals with a difficult past deserve safety, care, and respect.

Name: The Scottish Deer Centre and Wildlife Park
Description: The Scottish Deer Centre and Wildlife Park offers a great day out for all the family! Based just outside of Cupar, United Kingdom.

Name: Økologiens Have
Description:
I Økologiens Have arbejder vi med at fremme økologi i praksis samt inspirere til den grønne omstilling. 

Vi er en besøgs- og demonstrationshave for dig som enkeltperson såvel som for virksomheder og organisationer. 

Økologiens Haves kerneområde er at drive vores 11 hektar økologisk jord- og havebrug og invitere til grønne arrangementer og naturformidlende aktiviteter året rundt. 

Økologiens Have er en almennyttig forening drevet som en socialøkonomisk virksomhed. Her er, og skal være, plads til alle. 

Vi tror på, at den grønne omstilling sker gennem et holistisk blik for både menneskerne og jorden. 

Alle vores besøgende skal have mulighed for at lære om regenerativt jord- og havebrug, økologi, blive inspireret til naturoplevelser, modtage virkelyst og viden til, hvordan man selv kan bidrage til den grønne omstilling.

I Økologiens Have kan du hilse på vores: 
-	Æsler, heste, geder, får, høns, køer og grise, honningbier m.fl.

Du kan hente inspiration i vores:
-	Køkkenhave, staudemark (moderplanter til planteskolen), drivhus- og domer, parcelhushave, frugtlund m.fl. haveanlæg

Få gode råd, vejledning og planter med hjem ved planteskolen:
-	Vores økologiske, spaghnumfri planteskole er drevet af vores skønne gartnerteam Nanna og Hanne. 
-	Ofte ledsaget af praktikanter, som er meget velkomne.
-	Gartnerne er altid klar med gode råd og kundevejledning
-	Stort udvalg af planter til din egen have samt salg af spaghnumfri jord. 
-	Vi har også insektvenlige frøpakker, smukke lerkrukker, frø til køkkenhaven og meget mere. 

Du kan holde øje med vores kalender og/eller sociale medier, hvor vi inviterer til
-	Kurser (f.eks. køkkenhavekursus eller beskæring)
-	Rundvisninger
-	Grønne arrangementer og festivaler
-	Naturvejledninger og aktiviteter der følger årstiderne
-	Oplæg og workshops 

… og så kan du booke et arrangement, f.eks.: 
-	Naturvejledninger- og rundvisninger skræddersyet til jeres ønske
-	Lej vores smukke væksthus
-	Tilkøb af forplejning 

Mail@okologienshave.dk

Name: ZOO Bratislava
Description:
Zoologická záhrada v Bratislave je mestská príspevková organizácia, ktorej zriaďovateľom je Hlavné mesto Slovenskej republiky Bratislava. Ročne nás navštívi okolo 320 tisíc návštevníkov.

Našou misiou je spájať svet zvierat, ľudí a prírody cez poznanie a pozitívne zážitky. Prostredníctvom vysokej úrovne starostlivosti o zvieratá, programov záchrany ohrozených druhov a kvalitného vzdelávania plníme významnú úlohu v aktívnej ochrane prírody.

Sme prírodná ZOO na úpätí Malých Karpát s rozlohou 96 ha, v ktorej sa stretáva listnatý les, lúka, chladné údolie a prírodné jazierka.

Vo svojej starostlivosti máme 1104 jedincov zo 185 druhov. K najvzácnejším patria adax núbijský, diviak visajanský, orangutan sumatriansky, kulan turkménsky, gibon zlatolíci, hrošík libérijský, leopard cejlónsky. Sme tiež jediná ZOO na Slovensku, v ktorej nájdete šimpanzy, žirafy či nosorožce.

Zaujímavé expozície:

- výbeh pre vlky eurázijské ocenený cenou Bílý slon za najlepšie chovné zariadenie otvorené v roku 2018 v českých a slovenských zoo
- výbeh pre pandy červené so zapojenou stromovou vegetáciou
- lesné výbehy pre karpatskú faunu - zubra európskeho, jeleňa európskeho, muflóna lesného, diviaka lesného
- pavilón primátov pre šimpanzy učenlivé a orangutany sumatrianske
výbeh pre nosorožce

ZOO Bratislava je členom medzinárodných organizácií:

- Únia českých a slovenských zoologických záhrad UCSZOO
- Európska asociácia zoologických záhrad a akvárií EAZA
- Euroázijská regionálna asociácia zoologických záhrad a akvárií EARAZA
- Medzinárodná asociácia lektorov vzdelávania v zoo IZE
- Organizácia SPECIES360

Name: Animanatura Wild Sanctuary
Description:
Animanatura Wild Sanctuary è gestito dalla Wildlife Conservation S.r.l Benefit il cui impegno e volto alla conservazione delle specie animali in pericolo e alla salvaguardia della salute e del benessere di tutti gli animali.
   
Animanatura Wild Sanctuary nasce dall’esigenza di offrire agli animali che non possono essere reintrodotti in natura, una casa permanente.
Il Santuario si trova nel cuore della Maremma Toscana a Semproniano,
a pochi Km dalle Terme di Saturnia e ospita 450 animali di varie specie in un luogo meraviglioso che si estende per più di 21 ettari immerso nella
natura. Qui gli animali ospitati vivono in grandi aree semi-naturali: un luogo sicuro e rilassante per passare il resto della loro vita in tranquillità.

Uno dei principali obiettivi del Santuario è la sensibilizzazione sul tema della conservazione animale e ambientale.

VISION

Name: Heemtuin De Heimanshof
Description:
De Heimanshof is een heemtuin in Haarlemmermeer waar natuureducatie en natuurbeleving centraal staan. Je vindt er de verschillende landschappen van West-Nederland met de daarbij behorende flora en fauna.
 
Naast de landschappen met inheemse soorten herbergt de tuin ook een boomgaard, kruidentuin, bijenhuis, natuurspeelplaats en kassen met een aantal wereldklimaten. Deze diversiteit maakt De Heimanshof uniek in Nederland.
 
Een wandeling door de heemtuin is een ontdekkingsreis langs de prachtige flora en fauna van West-Nederland. Jaarlijkse zijn rond de 700 verschillende soorten, vooral inheemse, planten te zien.
 
In onze tuin krijgen jaarlijks zo'n 4.000 basisschool leerlingen Natuur- en Milieulessen. Daarnaast organiseert De Heimanshof het hele jaar door activiteiten om mensen te laten genieten van de tuin en kennis over de natuur op te doen.

Name: The Owls Trust
Description:
The Owls Trust, based at Bodafon Farm Park, Llandudno, is a small charity doing a big and important job. We have one of the most comprehensive collections of owls on display to the public in the UK. 
There are three main strands to our work. Firstly, we provide rescue and rehabilitation to injured birds of prey. We nurse the wild birds back to health and, when they are ready, we release them back into a suitable habitat. We are often asked to step in to rescue “pet” owls. These birds are frequently distressed and in poor condition. When we can we give them a permanent home with us where they can regain a good quality of life in more spacious and appropriate surroundings suitable to their specie.
Our second activity is to educate young people and older groups about our birds of prey, their place in our environment and how we can maintain their habitats to protect the bio-diversity of our countryside. 
Finally, we work with international partners to create and maintain breeding stocks of the world’s rarest owls. When imperiled habitats can be restored and protected, we will then be able to enhance threatened populations or even reintroduce new groups.

Name: Plantey
Description:
Plantey is an innovative startup developed under the INJAZ Company Program by Innovasphere — a team of young entrepreneurs passionate about sustainability, technology, and wellness.

We create smart, IoT-enabled flowerpots that make plant care easy, fun, and accessible for everyone. By combining real-time environmental sensors, automation, and a user-friendly mobile app, Plantey brings nature into daily life—no matter your space, schedule, or experience.

 Our Products:
Plantey-Pet – An AI-powered pot with a digital face designed to engage children and classrooms.

Plantey-Logy – A modular system for researchers and educators to monitor plant health.

Auto-Plantey – A self-watering, self-monitoring pot for busy users and urban living.

 Our Mission
Make plant care easier and more engaging through smart technology

Promote eco-friendly living through sustainable design

Bring greenery into homes, schools, and workplaces

Bridge the gap between nature and technology for better well-being

 Our Vision
A world where greenery is part of everyday life,
Where anyone can care for plants with confidence,
And where technology helps people reconnect with nature.

Name: Friendship Botanic Gardens
Description:
These historic gardens are inspired by the 1933 Century of Progress Fair in Chicago and cover land traced with trails used for hundreds of years by Native Americans. The grounds include 105 acres of trails through the woods and open spaces with gardens, a meadow, a lake, and Trail Creek. The gardens are open Tuesdays-Sunday 9 a.m.- 5 p.m. from May through the last weekend of October. Thursdays are half price admission days. Admission is $10 for ages 13 and over. Children 12 and under are free. Memberships are available for individuals or families.

Friendship Botanic Gardens are accessed by walking earthen trails and lawns. A golf cart tour is available to book online, and must be scheduled ahead of time. Those who take tours also must pay the day’s admission fee. 

Friendship Botanic Gardens are also available for wedding ceremonies and receptions and other events.

We host several cultural and educational events throughout the year.

Please visit our website at www.friendshipbotanicgardens.org for more information or call 219-878-9885.

Name: Hughes Park Community Garden
Description:
Hughes Park Community Garden (HPCG Inc) aka Lane Cove Community Garden, is gardener-run and supported by Lane Cove Council as the only community garden in the Lane Cove Cammeraygal region to date. 

As hobby gardeners, at HPCG we are passionate about providing space for organic kitchen-gardening and nurturing our local pollinator networks. Our membership come from diverse backgrounds and demographics, all are welcome. We are a gardener-run newly incorporated with tax deductible gift recipient status, as an independent organisation our membership fees are $75 per year, and a small amount extra if you’d like some private gardening space in addition to the community beds. Membership gets you access to the garden and facilities during daylight hours, and all members are encouraged to take part in the running of the garden.

Our monthly member working bees are on the first Sunday of every month from 9am. This is a great chance for anyone interested in learning more about HPCG to drop in for an introduction, or to sign up as a member and chat with fellow gardeners over morning tea. Get in touch with us via email or social media!

Name: Jardín Botánico VerdeNativo
Description:
Ubicado en el sector de Quilanto, en la comuna de Puerto Octay, a orillas del lago Llanquihue, el Jardín Botánico VerdeNativo es un refugio natural que abarca 33 hectáreas dedicadas a la conservación de la flora nativa de Chile. 
Con más de 700 especies arbóreas y arbustivas provenientes de distintas regiones del país, este parque ofrece una experiencia única de conexión con la biodiversidad y el paisaje del sur de Chile.

VerdeNativo cuenta con senderos interpretativos, miradores panorámicos hacia el volcán Calbuco y espacios diseñados para la recreación y la educación ambiental. Ideal para estudiantes, turistas y amantes de la naturaleza, el parque busca inspirar la valoración y preservación del entorno natural. Con más de dos décadas de desarrollo, VerdeNativo se proyecta como un modelo de turismo ecológico y educación ambiental, combinando conservación, aprendizaje y disfrute en un entorno único.

Our success is in strengthening and preserving the integrity of cultural heritage and environmental conservation from generational neglect to produce immense benefit for Flores through food security, biodiversity, conservation, natural aesthetics, and giving. Name: True Acacia
Description: Join the movement to reclaim truth and heritage. For thousands of years, the name Acacia symbolized sacredness, strength, and unity and was rooted in the African thorn trees used by prophets, pharaohs, and spiritual traditions. But in 2005, a quiet vote by Western botanists erased that legacy, giving the name Acacia to unrelated Australian shrubs. This wasn’t science, it was cultural erasure. By joining this cause, you stand for historical truth, scientific integrity, and the voices of civilizations too long ignored. Help us restore the rightful identity of the original Acacia. This is more than a name; it’s about justice, memory, and dignity. Take Acacia back.

Name: Succlent Garden Web
Description:
Welcome to Succulent Garden Web, the premier online resource dedicated to the art and science of growing succulents. Our website caters to succulent enthusiasts of all levels, providing comprehensive care guides, creative DIY projects, and practical troubleshooting tips to ensure your plants thrive.

At Succulent Garden Web, we delve deep into the specific needs of various succulent species. From watering schedules to optimal sunlight exposure, our care instructions are meticulously detailed to help you nurture your succulents with confidence. Each guide is crafted to address the unique requirements of different species, ensuring that whether you're tending to robust Echeverias or delicate Kalanchoes, your plants receive the care they deserve.

Our DIY section inspires you to incorporate succulents into your home and garden creatively. Learn how to build stunning succulent displays, from elegant terrariums to rustic succulent wreaths, with our easy-to-follow tutorials. These projects not only enhance your living space but also allow you to express your creativity through gardening.

For gardeners facing challenges such as pests or diseases, our troubleshooting tips provide clear, actionable solutions. We cover everything from identifying symptoms to effective treatment options, helping you restore the health of your succulent garden.

Succulent Garden Web also explores the broader benefits of cultivating succulents, including their ability to beautify your home and improve indoor air quality. Our articles keep you informed about the latest trends in succulent gardening and offer advice on how to integrate these versatile plants into your lifestyle.

Engage with our vibrant community of succulent lovers through the comment sections, where you can share your gardening triumphs, seek advice, and connect with others who share your passion for succulents.

Description:

Papagoide Paradiis is a unique space in Tallinn, home to dozens of magnificent exotic birds. It is a place where parrots can live in a friendly community and welcome their guests with enthusiasm. An experienced team has created an environment where feathered friends feel at home. Here everyone can get to know different species of parrots such as the Macaws, Moluccan Cockatoos, Jacos, Eclectus and many others. Visitors can enjoy a unique experience with parrots, learning about their unique characteristics and behavior.

Papagoide Paradiis on ainulaadne ruum, kus elavad kümned suurepärased eksootilised linnud.
See on koht, kus papagoid saavad elada sõbralikus kogukonnas ja tervitada oma külastajaid rõõmuga. Kogenud meeskond on loonud keskkonda, kus meie sulelised sõbrad tunnevad end nagu kodus. Siin saab igaüks tutvuda erinevate papagoi liikidega, nagu aarad, molukki kakaod, aafrika hallpapagoid, eklektuspapagoid ja paljud teised. Külastajad saavad nautida ainulaadset kogemust papagoidega suhtlemisel, õppides neid ja nende käitumist.
Loonud neile sooja ja hooliva kodu, kus papagoid saavad elada sõbralikus kogukonnas ja võtta oma külalisi entusiastlikult vastu. Kutsume Teid ja teie lähedasi: lapsi, sõpru meid külastama ja saama ainulaadse elamuse koos papagoidega.

Name: Stiftelsen Nordens Ark
Description:
På Nordens Ark brinner vi. Här är engagemanget stort och vi brinner för de hotade djuren, för att försöka skillnad och göra världen till en bättre plats. 
Vi är en ideell stiftelse som arbetar för att rädda utrotningshotade djur och bevara den biologiska mångfalden. Det gör vi genom avel och uppfödning men också genom forskning och utbildning.  För att göra det krävs att vi alla hjälps åt; djurvårdare, ekonomer, snickare, kockar, lokalvårdare, veterinärer, pedagoger och marknadsförare, bara för att nämna några.
Varje dag går vi till jobbet för att göra skillnad för de hotade djuren. 

At Nordens Ark we’re passionate. Passionate about saving endangered species. Every day we try to make a difference and make the world a better place.
Nordens Ark is a non-profit foundation that strives to ensure that endangered animals have a future. We are engaged in conservation, breeding, research and education, both at home and abroad. All of us play an important role; animal keepers, accountants, chefs, veterinarians, educators, carpenters, marketers, among others.
Every day we go to work to make a difference for endangered species.

Name: Rīga ZOO
Description:
Rīga ZOO vispārējais stratēģiskais mērķis ir uzturēt vienīgo nacionālo zooloģisko dārzu, izglītot sabiedrību par Latvijas un pasaules faunu un tās aizsardzību, ar kvalitatīvas atpūtas piedāvājumu veicināt veselīgu dzīvesveidu un tūrismu, veikt pētniecību un sniegt ieguldījumu reto un izzūdošo sugu saglabāšanā, vienlaikus nodrošinot augstu labturības līmeni zooloģiskā dārza dzīvniekiem. 

1992. gadā Rīgas zoodārzs iestājās Eiropas Zoodārzu un akvāriju asociācijā – EAZA (European Association of Zoos and Aquaria). Dalība šajā organizācijā uzliek pienākumu uzturēt augstus standartus gan dzīvnieku labturībā, gan citās zoodārza darbības jomās. Saskaņā ar EAZA formulētajiem zoodārzu stratēģiskajiem mērķiem, Rīgas zoodārzs uzņēmies piedalīties bioloģiskās daudzveidības saglabāšanā, ieguldīt resursus dabas aizsardzības projektos un veikt darbu vides izglītībā.

EAZA 2023. gada beigās apvieno vairāk kā 400 organizāciju no 48 valstīm Eiropā un Tuvajos Austrumos. EAZA izstrādā reģionālos sugu saglabāšanas plānus, uztur sugu nebrīves populāciju menedžmenta programmas un ciltsgrāmatas (2023. gada nogalē –  440 sugām).

Dzīvnieku demonstrēšana Rīga ZOO balstās uz svarīgākajiem progresīvo zooloģisko dārzu darbības principiem – dabas aizsardzību, dzīvnieku labturību un sabiedrības izglītošanu.

Īstenojot EAZA stratēģiskos mērķus, Rīga ZOO piedalās bioloģiskās daudzveidības saglabāšanā – veido un uztur ilgtspējīgas apdraudēto dzīvnieku sugu populācijas ex situ (Sugu aizsardzības un saglabāšanas pasākumi ārpus to dabīgās vides). Līdz 2025.gadam Rīga ZOO kolekcijā 25% no kopējā kolekcijas sugu skaita būs tādas, kas iekļautas Pasaules Sarkanajā grāmatā (IUCN Red Data List).

Name: Pittsburgh Botanic Garden
Description:
Pittsburgh Botanic Garden inspires people to value plants, garden design and the natural world by cultivating plant collections of the Allegheny Plateau and temperate regions, creating display gardens, conducting educational programs and conserving the environment.  
Pittsburgh Botanic Garden is a qualified caretaker for 460 acres of southwest Pennsylvania’s land and water. In addition to ongoing conservation efforts such as mitigating acid mine drainage and reforestation projects, the Garden provides 65 acres of cultivated gardens and woodlands for the public to connect to plants. Through this innate experience: young minds are engaged, gardeners are inspired, and all visitors find a sense of calm.
The dream of a group of horticulturalists, the initial idea for this outdoor public garden for the region began in the late 1980’s. The land was acquired through a 99-year lease from Allegheny County in 1998.  The Garden opened to the public in 2015 and continues to enhance and expand its gardens and woodlands. The new Welcome Center and surrounding Auto Garden opened on April 1, 2021, completing $12.5 million of projects to elevate the visitor experience with the addition of garden features, a café, as well as expanded learning and gathering spaces.
Since opening its gates to the public in 2015, more than 380,000 individuals have visited the Garden to explore, learn or celebrate a milestone. This visitation has increased year over year, with approximately 82,000 in 2023.  In addition to visitation, membership also has grown steadily with 3,700 households currently.

Description:

Home to nearly 3,000 animals of more than 400 different species, SCZ has been recognized with national and international awards for its support of field conservation programs and successful breeding of rare and endangered species. Opened in 1971, it has been ranked among the best zoos in the country and is the No. 1 outdoor family tourist attraction in Kansas. 

The Sedgwick County Zoo is a not-for-profit organization, accredited by the Association of Zoos and Aquariums (AZA).
