Name: Basel Zoo
Description: Basel Zoo, affectionately called ‘Zolli’ by the locals, is a green oasis in the heart of the city. With its unique park landscape and the close proximity visitors enjoy the animals, Zolli never fails to impress. Its winding paths lead you to over 500 animal species from all continents.

Name: Wildheart Animal Sanctuary
Description: The Wildheart Animal Sanctuary is a charity based in Sandown, Isle of Wight. We provide a safe haven for rescued exotic animals such as Big Cats.

Name: Watatunga Wildlife Reserve
Description: A one-of-a-kind safari in Norfolk, the award-winning wildlife reserve Watatunga. Committed to the conservation and protection of endangered animals such as antelope and deer, among other threatened species. Watatunga offers a unique guided experience taking visitors through 170 acres of woodland, grassland & wetland, allowing visitors to fully immerse themselves in the experience by viewing the animals via electric buggies.

Name: Reptile Encounters
Description:
Welcome to Reptile Encounters – Inspiration. Education. Conservation.

Founded in 2007 by the entrepreneurial Josh Cox, Reptile Encounters is a zoo in Burwood with a mission to be a voice for those who don't have one. We're dedicated to inspiring and educating the next generations to save our planet through unique wildlife activations.

Why Choose Us?

Award-Winning Excellence: We're the 2024 Bx Business xCellence Award winners for Educational Services, setting the gold standard in wildlife education.
Pathways Program: Our award-winning Pathways program provides individuals with autism hands-on experiences that foster growth, skill development, and a deeper connection with wildlife.
Passionate Educators: Our team, equipped with scales, feathers, and fur, sparks curiosity and fosters lifelong connections with nature for K-12 students.
Beyond the Classroom: We create lasting connections, inspiring conservation efforts and instilling responsibility towards protecting our planet.

Mission, Vision, and Motto:

Mission: To be a voice for those that don't have one.
Vision: To inspire and educate the next generations to save our planet.
Motto: Inspiration. Education. Conservation.

Our Journey:

From humble beginnings, Reptile Encounters has grown into a dynamic force in wildlife education. With a strong foundation in science—thanks to Josh's degree in Medical Science from LaTrobe University—and a passionate team, we've spent over 17 years creating engaging and impactful educational experiences.

Join us in making the world a wilder, more wonderful place by igniting a passion for conservation through wildlife education.

Name: Milwaukee Domes Alliance
Description:
The Milwaukee Domes Alliance (formerly Friends of the Domes) is a nonprofit organization managing the operations of the Mitchell Park Horticultural Conservatory, lovingly referred to as the Domes. 

As an operating partner of the Mitchell Park Horticultural Conservatory, the Milwaukee Domes Alliance helps cultivate a lifelong love of nature for all visitors through coordinating immersive, restorative experiences within the iconic horticultural oasis.

Established in 1989, the Milwaukee Domes Alliance directly channels resources that make possible many of the educational and cultural programs at the Domes. Our support complements, but is separate from, the support provided by Milwaukee County Parks.

The Domes’ three architecturally unique structures are filled with plants and animals from across the globe from different climates. In addition to the main campus, the conservatory includes six propagation greenhouses, and a greenhouse used for special events.

MISSION
We provide inspirational experiences that restore connections to nature and community in a one-of-a-kind horticultural oasis at the heart of Milwaukee.

VISION
A world that loves nature and protects our planet.

VALUES
Collaboration: Bringing resources and people together for community benefit.
Conservation: Preserving our innovative and iconic building while growing a love of nature that encourages sustainable living.
Wellness: Restoring human connection to nature that heals our mind and body.
Equity: Ensuring all members of the community have equitable access to nature.

Name: LA BAMBOUSERAIE EN CEVENNES
Description:
Unique en Europe, classée parmi les plus beaux jardins de France.
La Bambouseraie est un voyage à travers les cinq continents, où vous trouverez des spécimens d’exception, plus d’un millier de variétés.
Une expérience au cœur du végétal à vivre et à partager.
Notre préoccupation quotidienne la préservation de la biodiversité. 
Alors n’attendez plus et venez admirer toutes sortes de bambous, mais aussi érables du Japon, camélias, ginkgos biloba, séquoias centenaires, fleurs, etc.

Name: Danske Akkrediterede Zoos og Akvarier (DAZA)
Description:
DAZA er en forening bestående af 15 af de største og bedste zoologiske haver og akvarier i Danmark. De arbejder for at øge interessen, forståelsen og respekten for naturen og for at bevare klodens rige dyreliv.

Foreningens formål er at fremme samarbejdet mellem danske zoologiske anlæg, særlig med fokus på formidling, naturbevarelse og forskning i vilde dyr.

Medlemmerne skal som en del af samarbejdet assistere hinanden med rådgivning og udveksling af dyr. Hensigten med dette er at højne kvaliteten i det enkelte anlæg og sikre, at det lever op til de nyeste standarder for drift af zoologiske anlæg.

Foreningen repræsenterer medlemmerne i nationale og internationale spørgsmål.

Name: L'Aquàrium de Barcelona
Description: L'Aquàrium de Barcelona is an individual & family services company based out of MOLL D'ESPANYA DEL PORT VELL, S/N, BARCELONA, Spain.

Name: Dierenpark Hoenderdaell
Description: Dierenpark Hoenderdaell: een verborgen en fascinerend dierenrijk in Noord-Holland. Hier wandel je vrij rond tussen de ondeugende ringstaartmaki's, de nieuwsgierige doodshoofdaapjes en voer je samen met de kids de kleurrijke en kletsende lori's. Bij ons leven ook grote roofvogels, krokodillen, hyena's, wolven én beren! De dieren hebben volop de ruimte en onze bezoekers beleven die met ze mee op een heerlijke dag midden in de natuur. En wat te denken van de leeuwen en de tijgers? Stichting Leeuw heeft haar grootste opvang van grote katachtigen van heel Europa, bij ons in Dierenpark Hoenderdaell. Ook de organisatie SOS Dolfijn is thuis op het park met een ziekenhuis voor kleine walvisachtigen, zoals de bruinvis. Hoenderdaell wordt bovendien omringd door een stiltegebied waar de natuurliefhebber al wandelend echt van de vrije natuur kan proeven. Wil je komen bezoeken? In Dierenpark Hoenderdaell voel je je zo vrij als een vogeltje terwijl je geniet van een niet-traditionele roofvogelshow, onze bijzondere Noord-Hollandse luchten en al die prachtige dieren in een zo natuurlijk mogelijke omgeving.

Name: Ruth Bancroft Garden
Description: A world-renowned 3.5-acre garden, housing a collection of succulents, both unique and beloved, as well as drought-tolerant plants from around the world. The Garden’s founder, Ruth Bancroft, lived to be 109 and was a pioneer in drought-tolerant gardening. Open to the public year-round, the Garden showcases fabulous blooms during every season and highlights plant structure and texture in robust plantings.

Name: ManyZoos
Description:
We are committed to supporting open-access, pro-active, evidence-based zoo management across taxa through research collaborations

We seek to:
Unite animal care professionals and academic researchers who share common zoo research goals
Provide guidance for (1) researchers seeking to lead research in zoos by connecting them and providing AZA resources to oversee their own multi-institution projects and for (2) zoo professionals interested in the data collection and/or animal welfare aspect by connecting them with academics who have necessary research resources

Name: Association des Amis des Jardins Remarquables Européens
Description: L’AAJRE, en étroite relation avec le ministère de la Culture en France, l’ASBL Parcs et Jardins de Wallonie en Belgique, et toute structure susceptible de se voir reconnaître dans d’autres pays d’Europe le droit de délivrer le label « Jardin remarquable », a vocation à réunir les amateurs européens de l’Art des jardins, et plus particulièrement les propriétaires et gestionnaires de jardins labellisés Jardin remarquable, tant en France qu’en Belgique, et un jour ailleurs en Europe.

Name: Hortus Botanicus Haren
Description:
De Hortus Botanicus Haren is de grootste en één van de oudste botanische tuinen van Nederland. Met ruim 14 hectare aan tuinen is er voor jong en oud veel te ontdekken. Zo kan je in Hortus Haren onder andere de volgende unieke tuinen vinden: 

 De unieke Chinese Ming-tuin: Buiten China is een dergelijke tuin alleen nog te vinden in Canada en Australië. 
 Laarmantuin: Hier groeien veel met uitsterven bedreigde planten en bomen. De Laarmantuin is opgedeeld in een pinetum, een arboretum, een heidegebied en een weidegebied. De Laarmantuin is opgenomen in de Nationale Plantencollectie en is een cultureel historisch monument; 
 De Hondsrugtuin, welke deel uit maakt van de “Hondsrug Unesco Global Geopark”; 
 De Keltische Tuin: De Keltische tuin is een symbolische natuurtuin waar de bomencirkel, het Ogham-alfabet en mythologische elementen samen een fantasierijke, educatieve en spirituele beleving vormen.

Verder kan je heerlijk wandelen door onder andere de grote vlinder- en bijentuin en ook kinderen kunnen de tuinen ontdekken aan de hand van een speurtocht. 

Je bent van harte welkom om lekker urenlang te struinen door onze prachtige tuinen!

Name: ACE for Wildlife Network
Description:
As zoos and aquariums seek to motivate our visitors to act in ways that benefit animals in human care and in the wild, we are learning through emerging behavioral science that feeling empathy may be a necessary step between learning and taking conservation action. 

From 2015-2017, Woodland Park Zoo, Seattle Aquarium, and Point Defiance Zoo & Aquarium partnered through the Measuring Empathy Collaborative Assessment Project (MECAP) to define empathy for wildlife and develop tools to measure it.

While implementing empathy practices over the next four years, Woodland Park Zoo recognized how much there still was to learn. The zoo saw an opportunity for sector-wide growth by convening organizations that were working to achieve their missions through empathy practices. A needs assessment identified learning and collaboration opportunities that became the foundation of the Advancing Conservation through Empathy for Wildlife (ACE for Wildlife) Network, launched in 2019 with the support of private funding. 

Today, 29 US-based zoos and aquariums (Network Partner Organizations) and a global community of more than 1,000 Members and Affiliates from over 300 organizations continue to learn together, creating and sharing effective practices that promote empathy for animals and people.

Name: Drusillas Park
Description: Enjoy a great family day out at one of the top kids days out in Sussex. Widely regarded as the best small zoo in the country we've created an animal and child friendly environment where the focus is always on fun finding out. However, animals are only half the fun; Go Wild!, Get Wet!, Go Safari!, The Rainforest Adventure, SPARK, Amazon Adventure, Mungo's Adventure Maze and all our free children's rides are paradise for anyone wanting a theme park experience. It's no ordinary zoo, it's no ordinary day out!

Name: Panther Ridge Conservation Center
Description: Panther Ridge Conservation Center is home to over 20 big cats representing nine different species.  We strive to engage the public with our feline ambassadors so that they may become aware of the plight of big cats in the wild.  Once a cat is accepted by Panther Ridge, it will never again need a home, or be at risk of neglect or mishandling.  Daily keeper tours start at only $30, are one hour long, where you get to meet all 9 species up close.  Just call to confirm your spot. 561 795 8914

Name: Parks! America
Description:
Parks! America Inc. is a public company with a strong record of success, an experienced senior management team and a diverse Board of Directors. 

The company is in the business of acquiring and operating family entertainment parks, including amusement parks, water parks, and animal parks. 

The 2020 fiscal year revenue totaled a record $9.5 million, and 2021 fiscal year revenue exceeded $11 million.  The company includes three owned subsidiaries:  Wild Animal Safari in Pine Mountain, Georgia, Wild Animal Safari in Springfield, Missouri and Aggieland Safari in Bryan-College Station, Texas.

The Wild Animal Safari Park in Pine Mountain, Georgia was acquired in 2005, Wild Animal Safari in Springfield/Strafford, Missouri was acquired in 2008 and the company purchased the Aggieland Safari in 2020.

All three parks provide quality family entertainment for all ages.  Guests get to be close and personal with wild and exotic animals from all over the globe.  Each park consists of over five hundred wild animals that roam free in hundreds of open pastures and/or are highlighted in Walkabout Adventure Zoo exhibits.  Guests can learn about animal conservation and education through animal feeding experiences and semi-private animal encounters.  The parks have initiated Jr. Zookeeper Summer Day Camps for extended learning opportunities for kids under 16 years old.

Name: Fundação Jardim Zoológico de Brasília
Description: A Fundação Jardim Zoológico de Brasília (FJZB) é uma instituição socioambiental inaugurada no dia 06 de dezembro de 1957, antes mesmo da capital federal. É reconhecida por desenvolver ações com foco na educação ambiental, conservação e preservação da fauna brasileira. É um órgão da administração indireta vinculada à Secretaria de Estado de Meio Ambiente do DF (SEMA).

Name: Schönbrunner Tiergarten GesmbH
Description:
Der Tiergarten Schönbrunn ist der älteste Zoo der Welt. Er wurde 1752 von Kaiser Franz I. Stephan von Lothringen, dem Gemahl Maria Theresias, gegründet und ist Teil des UNESCO Weltkulturerbes Schönbrunn. Sechs Mal in Folge wurde er als bester Zoo Europas ausgezeichnet. Auch einzigartige Zuchterfolge wie die Welterstnachzucht der Batagur Flussschildkröte und der Winkerfrösche machten den Tiergarten weit über die Grenzen Österreichs hinaus bekannt. Seit dem Jahr 2006 besuchen den Tiergarten jährlich über 2 Millionen Besucher aus dem In- und Ausland.

Als barocke Menagerie hat der Tiergarten eine interessante Vergangenheit, zählt heute aber zu den modernsten Zoos der Welt. Das imperiale Flair und die Verbindung von Denkmalschutz und zeitgemäßer Tierhaltung machen seinen besonderen Charme aus. Auf einer Fläche von 17 Hektar bietet der Zoo einen Lebensraum für über 700, zum Teil hochbedrohte Tierarten. Die populärsten Bewohner des Tiergartens sind die Großen Pandas, bei denen es schon fünf Jungtiere gab. Der Tiergarten zählt zu jenen wenigen Zoos der Welt, denen die Volksrepublik China im Rahmen eines Pandaschutzprojekts ein Pärchen dieser seltenen Tiere anvertraut hat.

Name: Animal Training Toolkit
Description:
A good training program is vital to helping any Zoo take care of their charges. The animals in zoo collections benefit greatly by proactively and intentionally learning how to cooperate with their own care and management.

Tailored services include (but are not limited to):
- Animal Training Program Planning, Evaluations & Reports
- Animal Training Operation Management 
- Animal Training Project Management 
- Staff Coaching & Development

Name: Selwo Marina
Description:
En Selwo Marina Benalmadena, estamos comprometidos con la conservación de la vida animal y formamos parte de asociaciones e iniciativas que trabajan en ello. 

Todas las especies de Selwo Marina reciben los más altos estándares de atención para conseguir su máximo bienestar, siempre bajo el estricto cuidado de personal cualificado formado por veterinarios, biólogos y cuidadores.

Un día en Selwo Marina es un día cargado de aprendizajes y momentos inolvidables para toda la familia.

Name: Miami Beach Botanical Garden
Description: The Miami Beach Botanical Garden is a unique, subtropical oasis of beauty and tranquility within an urban setting. We are a community resource that engages, inspires and refreshes our visitors. Our mission is to promote environmental enjoyment, stewardship and sustainability through education, the arts and interaction with the natural world.  We are also a dynamic venue for weddings, corporate meetings, social gatherings, cultural events, art performances and healthy living. We are open Tuesday - Sunday from 9am to 5pm. Admission is free. Become a Garden member and enjoy the benefits of membership.

Name: Vildriket
Description: Välkommen till Vildriket! Sedan 1992 har Järvzoo arbetat med att bevara den biologiska mångfalden genom att verka för en vildare värld. Nu byter vi kostym och blir Vildriket. Tillsammans med våra besökare, forskningen och näringslivet kraftsamlar vi nu för att skapa ännu mer positiv förändring – och ett vildare Norden.

Name: State Botanical Garden of Georgia
Description: The State Botanical Garden of Georgia, a unit of UGA Public Service and Outreach, is one of the state’s most treasured resources. With 323 acres of natural areas and cultivated gardens, the State Botanical Garden offers unique experiences for nature lovers. The garden offers eight specialty gardens, including the Alice H. Richards Children’s Garden, and over five miles of trails within an Audubon-designated important birding area. Throughout the year, the garden hosts educational programming, including camps, classes, workshops, concerts and festivals for visitors of all ages. Facilities across the garden feature art exhibits and annual lectures, including the Porcelain and Decorative Arts Museum.

Name: Foundation Arboretum Wespelaar
Description:
The arboretum is well known for its extensive collection of Magnolia, Rhododendron and Acer as well as for its beautiful autumn colours. We also focus on offering qualitative guided visits and a fully and correctly labeled
collection. Less familiar plant genera such as Lindera, Carya, Stewartia, Franklinia etc., are also widely represented in the Arboretum. These collections have been planted throughout the 20 hectare of the Arboretum.

Name: Eco Park Foz
Description: Natureza, interação e respeito com o meio ambiente: esse é o Eco Park. Localizado em Foz do Iguaçu, o parque ecológico oferece experiências para toda a família: desde o contato com a fascinante e milenar arte dos voos das aves de rapina, passando pela cultura e tradição do cavalo crioulo, e a observação dos animais abrigados e acolhidos no local.

Name: Harteman Wildfowl Aviaries
Description:
Harteman Wildfowl is a small private collection of waterfowl managed by Jan Harteman. 

What started of as a hobby in grew into a lifelong passion for waterfowl and their conservation. I share this passion through website, social media channels, publishing articles and photography in magazines, as well as amongst other things, being a board member of the International Wild Waterfowl Association and Aviornis International Netherlands.

I want to contribute to knowledge, education and conservation by being part of EAZA’s Ex-situ Programmes (EEP); as well as directly contributing to ex-situ conservation by keeping and breeding threatened species in my private collection – gathering data and images about these three duck species in my private collection – and educating the general public through my personal website and social media channels. Being part of the EAZA EEP studbooks, my facilities have been checked by the studbook keepers to verify if I could keep these species in my current aviaries. Alongside I agreed to fulfil obligations like annual reporting, medical research, post mortem research and keeping offspring at our location until the studbook keeper has found a suitable new collection. As a private aviculturist I am reaching out to these professional EEP programs and want to be a part of them, and species conservation in general, for the long run.

Name: Bowman's Hill Wildflower Preserve Association, Inc.
Description:
Bowman's Hill Wildflower Preserve is a non-profit 501(c)(3) organization that showcases an extraordinary diversity of plants native to Pennsylvania and the Delaware Valley region. We steward and protect our museum-accredited native plant collection with the goal of encouraging the public to visit, enjoy and learn about the richness of Pennsylvania's natural heritage.

Of the approximately 2,000 species native to Pennsylvania, the Preserve is home to nearly 800 of them. More than 70 of these species are rare, threatened or endangered native plants designated as Plants of Special Concern in Pennsylvania. A deer exclosure fence surrounds and protects 100 of our 134 acres. Over five and a half miles of picturesque trails offer some of the best hiking in all of Bucks County.

You’re invited to learn more about our unique plant collection and the wealth of birds, butterflies and other wildlife that it supports. Educational programs run year- round, and the renowned Native Plant Nursery is open from April through early November. Take advantage of our online native plant resources, and visit us to enjoy a safe, outdoor connection to nature!

Name: Zoo de Jurques
Description: La faune du monde entier au cœur de la Normandie

Name: AQWA- The Aquarium of Western Australia
Description:
The Aquarium Of Western Australia is the State's premiere marine attraction, a specialised aquarium overlooking the magnificent Indian Ocean on Perths northern coastline. 

AQWA proudly showcases only native Western Australian marine life from the icy waters of the southern ocean to the far north of the state  covering over 12,000km of richly diverse coastline. 

Australia’s largest single aquarium, AQWA’s ‘Shipwreck Coast’, holds three million litres of sea water and features the near 100m underwater tunnel offering vistors the fantastic opportunity to journey beneath the ocean and experience the marine world from a different perspective.

Through education and engagement AQWA aims to inspire wonder and respect for all marine life and a greater understanding and appreciation of our oceans.

Funded by AQWA, community donations and sponsorships, The AQWA Foundation, is a registered non-profit environmental organisation, committed to support and undertake projects or initiatives that promote awareness of marine environments, foster change and advocate for positive relationships between people and the sea. The  foundation is committed to the ongoing rescue, care, rehabilitation and conservation of sick or injured marine animals  funding the construction and ongoing activity of AQWA's turtle rescue and rehabilitation facility.

Name: Arboretum du Vallon de l'Aubonne
Description:
Un arboretum est un site voué à la présentation et à la préservation d’essences ligneuses ornementales, forestières et fruitières. Il permet d’apprendre à connaître les arbres.

Créé en 1968,  l’Arboretum du Vallon de l’Aubonne, est unique en Suisse. Il s’étend sur une superficie de 200 hectares composée de forêts et de prés. L’Arboretum poursuit un objectif à la fois scientifique, éducatif et récréatif : faire connaître et apprécier les arbres.
Les collections d’arbres et d’arbustes présentées dans l’Arboretum représentent à ce jour plus de 90 genres différents et regroupent plus de 3’000 espèces et variétés différentes, qui provoquent l’admiration de très nombreux visiteurs passionnés de nature.

Name: Botanischer Garten Berlin | Botanic Garden Berlin
Description:
Mit fast 20.000 Pflanzenarten ist der Botanische Garten Berlin nicht nur der größte in Deutschland, sondern auch einer der bedeutendsten weltweit. Auf einer Fläche von 43 Hektar im Freiland und in 15 Gewächshäusern erhalten Besucher faszinierende Einblicke in die Welt der Botanik. Unser Herbarium wurde 1819 gegründet und ist das größte in Deutschland. Es umfasst eine Sammlung von fast 4 Millionen konservierten Exemplaren. Alle Pflanzengruppen – Blütenpflanzen, Farne, Moose, Lebermoose und Algen sowie Pilze und Flechten – sind in den weltweit angelegten Sammlungen vertreten. Der Botanische Garten Berlin ist auch ein Zentrum für internationale Biodiversitätsforschung, das Wissen generiert und vermittelt. Seit 1995 ist die Einrichtung Teil der Freien Universität Berlin. Home to nearly 20,000 plant species, the Berlin Botanic Garden is not only the largest in Germany, but also one of the most important in the world. Visitors can gain fascinating insights into the world of botany across its 43 hectares of outdoor grounds and 15 greenhouses. Our herbarium was founded in 1819 and is the largest in Germany. It holds a collection of nearly 4 million preserved specimens. All plant groups – flowering plants, ferns, mosses, liverworts, and algae, as well as fungi and lichens – are represented in the collections which are worldwide in scope.
The Botanic Garden Berlin is also a hub for international biodiversity research, generating and imparting knowledge. Since 1995, the institution has been part of Freie Universität Berlin.

Name: SELWO AVENTURA
Description: Selwo Aventura es un novedoso concepto de parque,  con propuestas dirigidas a acercarnos y aprender a respetar la flora y la fauna con tres objetivos clave: descubrir, aprender y divertir.

Name: AquaZoo Leeuwarden
Description: Mens en natuur groeien steeds verder uit elkaar. Zorg voor de natuur en aandacht voor het milieu is essentieel voor de toekomst van onze aarde. AquaZoo Leeuwarden speelt een belangrijke rol in het verbinden van mens en natuur.

Name: Viagrow
Description: Viagrow was created with the drive to help make hydroponics the future of horticulture. We pride ourselves in providing knowledge and the best available products to our customers. Carefully chosen and tested equipment and nutrients ensure our customers have maximum results with their plants. We deal in practical, environmentally conscious methods, mastering how to garden effectively. Teaching earth-friendly practices also translates directly to the community. Can't find what you are looking for? Contact us and we will find it for you. We pride ourselves on our knowledge about the products we sell and the ability to answer your questions.

Name: Trentham Monkey Forest
Description:
Walk amongst monkeys and enjoy a unique day out for all the family.

Monkey Forest is home to 140 free-ranging Barbary macaques. Visitors walk along the 3/4 of a mile pathway. Walk, watch and be AMAZED as the endangered monkeys live as they would in the wild.

Situated in an ancient Staffordshire forest Trentham Monkey Forest is the perfect day out for all ages.

A unique experience to see monkeys living freely*
No cages or bars, monkeys are free to roam
Learn and find out about the conservation of this endangered species
1 species of monkey – the Barbary macaque

Name: Associação de Zoológicos e Aquários do Brasil (AZAB)
Description: A Associação de Zoológicos e Aquários do Brasil (AZAB) é referência nacional em manejo, conservação e bem-estar animal, promovendo a integração e o desenvolvimento das instituições zoológicas brasileiras. Atuamos com os mais altos padrões éticos e buscamos inserir nossas instituições na comunidade zoológica internacional, contribuindo para a proteção da fauna sob cuidados humanos e a preservação do meio ambiente.

Name: Peak Wildlife Park
Description: Peak Wildlife Park is a company based out of Peak Wildlife Park, Nr. Winkhill, Leek, United Kingdom.

Name: ZooTraining
Description:
Evidence-based animal training and behavior management for forward-thinking zoos and professionals.

Our mission is to empower professionals, commited individuals and zoological institutions to act ethically and effectively.

Through expert coaching and evidence-based training, we drive animal welfare, conservation and continuous improvement.

We offer expert, unique, and specialized training programs that combine theory grounded in behavioral science, hands-on practice, and immersive experiences to provide comprehensive learning opportunities.
Through tailor-made support, we address the specific needs of each professional and institution.
Our approach emphasizes ongoing awareness of ethics and a holistic, responsible vision of animal welfare.

At the heart of an international community of committed professionals, we encourage the exchange of knowledge and best practices, thereby contributing to a lasting impact on wildlife conservation.

Our offerings include:
	•	Theoretical and practical training sessions
	•	360° project consulting and support
       •      Consulting and coaching

Name: Fife Zoo
Description: We're a small family zoo, opening in July 2019. There’s three things we’re passionate about at Fife Zoo. That’s conservation, education and the environment. And if we can give you an exciting visit at the same time, we’re happy!

Name: L'annuaire des Jardins
Description: Find all gardens to visit in France ! Easy search and GPS guidance

Name: Gardening Favors
Description: Gardening Favors stands as the premier website dedicated to providing comprehensive reviews on garden products. We offer a wealth of resources and guides, along with the latest gardening updates and news. #gardening #garden #gardentools #gardenguide #gardeningtips #gardeningtools

Name: Stichting Tuinen Mien Ruys
Description: De Tuinen  Mien Ruys zijn een reeks van 30 stijltuinen van de internationaal bekende Nederlandse tuinarchitect Mien Ruys. De tuinen bevinden zich in Dedemsvaart, de geboorte- en werkplaats van Mien Ruys. Ze zijn door haar aangelegd volgens zowel oude als nieuwe tuinideeën en beplant met uitgebalanceerde combinaties van planten. Behalve als demonstratietuinen, dienden ze ook voor het beproeven van beplanting en tuinmaterialen. De tuinen vormen nog steeds een bron van inspiratie voor liefhebbers.

Name: Zoo Hannover
Description:
Our mission is to inspire and foster people's love for animals and enthuse them about the conservation of species. To propagate empathy for their struggles in diminished habitats.
This vision stands at the core of our charter. It is our mandate to advocate for the animals' continued right to exist. This guiding principle motivates us every day.

Name: Monte Palace Madeira
Description: With breathtaking views over Funchal Bay, Monte Palace Madeira - Tropical Garden blends nature, art, and culture. Explore 70,000 m² of lush gardens with global vegetation, including proteas, sequoias, and olive trees. Admire Oriental Gardens, UNESCO-listed Laurissilva, and exotic fauna like peacocks and flamingos. Discover the largest private tile collection in the Iberian Peninsula, stunning sculptures, and Manueline elements. Visit the Monte Palace Museum for minerals and modern art. Named one of the 13 best botanical gardens by Condé Nast Traveller and a Tripadvisor Travelers' Choice Best of the Best from 2014 to 2024, Monte Palace Madeira - Tropical Garden is a must-visit. Open daily except 25th December, from 9:30am to 6:00pm. Accessible via cable car from Funchal, buses 20, 21, 22, and 48, taxi, or private car. We recommend wearing comfortable footwear. Caminho das Babosas nº4 e 4-A, 9050-541 Funchal, Madeira, Portugal. Tickets - Adults: 15€. Children up to 14 years old: Free.

Name: Dow Gardens
Description: Since being established in 1899, as a home for Herbert H. and Grace A. Dow and family, the 110-acre Dow Gardens now welcomes more than 130,000 guests per year. Visitors are invited to leave the pathway and explore the uniquely-designed landscape, take a tour of the historic Pines Home, participate in one of many hands-on educational programs, and discover beautiful art and music in a relaxed setting. Dow Gardens is comprised of an Estate Garden, Exploration Garden, and Whiting Forest, which (upon completion) will take visitors four stories high to stroll along the nation’s longest forest canopy walk.

Name: Sculpture by the Lakes
Description:
Sculpture by the Lakes is a unique outdoor art venue, showcasing internationally acclaimed artwork and nature conservation working seamlessly together. The park, which is internationally acclaimed as one of only nine accredited botanic gardens in the UK, offers visitors a tranquil, retreat-like experience across its entire site through its carefully curated collection of exclusive artwork, landscaped gardens, and high-quality facilities.
 
Founders Simon and Monique Gudgeon have combined their love for the outdoors and art, to create a unique 26-acre destination. Alongside the lakes features a dedicated Gallery showcasing UK and international artists, The Kitchen, a café restaurant serving seasonal dishes using produce sourced directly from the park’s on-site kitchen garden, and The Store and The Pantry where hand-crafted products and produce can be purchased. 
 
Curated, private venues dotted across the site also provide the perfect haven for corporate away days. Escape to Sculpture by the Lakes and discover a space for teams to be inspired and immersed in nature, art, and wildlife.

Name: Happy Gardening By Seema
Description:
We provide fresh and healthy plants for your space.

Happy Gardening by Seema is an initiative to bring about the best of greenery to homes across Mumbai and Navi Mumbai. Started in 2015, we are committed to delivering the most creative plants at your doorstep. 
We not only promotes plants but also promotes distributing the secrets of gardening. Be it any events, gardening workshops, corporate lectures or providing the perfect eco friendly gift, we are a package that does it all.

Name: Touroparc Zoo
Description:
Bienvenue chez Touroparc – une histoire de passion familiale au cœur de la nature ! 

Depuis 1961, Touroparc est bien plus qu’un parc zoologique : c’est un lieu de vie, d’émerveillement et de sens. Fondé par René Livet, il incarne une tradition familiale tournée vers le respect des animaux, la conservation et l’accueil du public. Aujourd’hui, sur 12 hectares, c’est plus de 700 animaux répartis en 140 espèces, évoluant dans des espaces conçus pour leur bien-être.  

Mais Touroparc, c’est aussi un parc d’attractions, un parc aquatique et des animations variées pour tous les âges. 

 Pourquoi choisir Touroparc pour vos événements professionnels ? 

Chez nous, travail et plaisir se combinent dans un cadre unique. Vous cherchez un lieu original pour vos séminaires, journées d’entreprise ou arbres de Noël ? Nous vous accompagnons pas à pas pour bâtir une expérience sur mesure : 

 Salles et espaces modulables pour accueillir réunions, restaurations ou cocktails 
 Rencontres privilégiées avec les animaux 
 Animations : activités ludiques, sportives ou culturelles 
 La magie de Noël en pleine nature ! 
 Team building : esprit d’équipe et cohésion garanti 
 Restauration sur place : adaptés à vos besoins 
 Engagement & sens : contribuez à notre mission de sensibilisation via Touroparc Conservation  

Nous construisons avec vous un programme qui mêle travail, cohésion et découverte, pour sortir du cadre classique. 

Vous êtes prêts à écrire un chapitre inédit pour votre entreprise ?

  Contactez-nous pour échanger sur votre projet : nous serons ravi de vous faire vivre une expérience à la fois utile, marquante et conviviale chez Touroparc

Name: Verband der Zoologischen Gärten (VdZ) e.V.
Description: Der Verband der Zoologischen Gärten (VdZ) ist die führende Vereinigung wissenschaftlich geleiteter Zoologischer Gärten mit Wirkungsschwerpunkt im deutschsprachigen Raum. Unser gesellschaftlicher Auftrag liegt im Erhalt der biologischen Vielfalt. Diesen Auftrag erfüllen wir durch die Haltung und Zucht gefährdeter Tierarten sowie durch das Engagement im Natur-, Arten-, Umwelt- und Tierschutz, die Bildung für nachhaltige Entwicklung, die Förderung der Forschung und die Schaffung von naturnahen Erholungsräumen.

Name: Zoo de Lourosa
Description:
O Zoo de Lourosa – Parque Ornitológico é o único parque zoológico do país que se dedica exclusivamente a aves. Com uma coleção de 500 animais de 150 espécies diferentes, distribuídos por 80 habitats, é um espaço que apela à educação ambiental, à conservação das espécies e da Biodiversidade. Aqui dedicamo-nos à recriação, à preservação e ao conhecimento. Queremos que faça parte desta aventura, num palco único de vida selvagem!

Representando os 5 continentes, com uma inestimável preocupação na recriação de cada habitat natural das nossas espécies, pretendemos que o visitante possa usufruir em pleno de uma das mais belas e exuberantes coleções de aves existentes em cativeiro em todo o Mundo.

Name: Black Rock Forest
Description: Black Rock Forest is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization with a mission of advancing scientific understanding of the natural world through research, education, and conservation programs. The organization maintains a 3,920-acre forest and a scientific field station in the Hudson Highlands, 60 miles north of New York City. We collaborate with our Consortium members – universities, schools, scientific and cultural institutions – to pursue and foster scientific inquiry, and to create educational programs for K-16 students, teachers, and the general public. Black Rock Forest works with many partners to pursue conservation goals in the Hudson Highlands and the greater mid-Hudson Valley region.

Name: La Garenne
Description: Structure de 3 hectares située dans le canton de Vaud, sur les contreforts du Jura entre Lausanne et Genève, le parc La Garenne offre une vue imprenable sur la chaîne des Alpes. Grâce à sa collection d’espèces indigènes et à des programmes d’éducation pertinents, le parc œuvre à sensibiliser le public aux enjeux de l’érosion de la biodiversité. Il participe par ailleurs à la reproduction d’espèces en déclin en vue de leur réintroduction dans le milieu sauvage. Enfin, il héberge en son sein un centre de soins qui a vocation à soigner, réhabiliter et relâcher, la faune sauvage blessée. Les animaux du parc sont majoritairement issus du centre de soins quand ceux-ci ne sont plus en mesure de retrouver la liberté.

Name: Green Kingdom Botanical Garden
Description: Nestled in the heart of Hyderabad, India, the Green Kingdom botanical garden is a sprawling oasis of natural beauty and cultural richness. Encompassing an impressive 150 acres, this botanical paradise stands as a testament to the wonders of the plant kingdom, boasting a unique collection of trees from 80 different countries. However, Green Kingdom offers much more than just botanical diversity; it seamlessly blends the beauty of nature with the artistry of human creativity.

Name: Racine Zoo
Description: Nestled on the sandy shores of beautiful Lake Michigan, the Racine Zoo is home to some of the world's most remarkable and endangered wildlife. The walk is easy for kids and seniors, making the Racine Zoo a great way to enjoy the outdoors with the family.

Name: Retired
Description: Retired

Name: Allwetterzoo Münster
Description:
"Willkommen im Allwetterzoo Münster. Wo sonst im Münsterland kann an einem Tag die ganze Welt bereist werden. Abtauchen in den Ozeanen oder zu Fuß von den gemäßigten Breiten über die Subtropen bis in den tiefsten Dschungel – hier heißt es Vielfalt begegnen und Großes erleben. Hunde dürfen gerne mitgebracht werden und kosten keinen Eintritt. Die Zoogastronomie lädt zum Verweilen und Speisen ein."
Der Allwetterzoo Münster ist eine der führenden Institutionen in den Bereichen Natur-, Umwelt- und vor allem Artenschutz. Um dieser Verantwortung gerecht zu werden, gibt es im Allwetterzoo eigens dafür einen Kurator, der verschiedene Schutzprojekte und –initiativen koordiniert und auch für die Zooeigenen Institutionen „Internationales Zentrum für Schildkrötenschutz (IZS)“ sowie das kambodschanische Artenschutzzentrum „Angkor Centre for Conservation of Biodiversity (ACCB)“ verantwortlich ist.

Name: African Safari Wildlife Park
Description: African Safari Wildlife Park has been delighting families for over 50 years. The free-range Drive-Thru Safari features giraffe, bison, alpacas and deer. The Walk-Thru Safari, open seasonally, features kangaroos, porcupines, birds and educational animal programs.

Name: Hortus Malabaricus
Description:
Hortus Malabaricus Botanical Garden in Cheruthuruthy, Thrissur, is dedicated to conserving Kerala’s native medicinal plants. Inspired by the 17th-century Hortus Malabaricus treatise, the 27-acre garden hosts over 1500 species, including 720 from the original work.

A project of SciGenom Research Foundation, it blends history, science, and conservation to preserve the rich plant heritage of the Western Ghats.

Name: Washed Ashore
Description:
Washed Ashore, Art to Save the Sea is a nonprofit organization committed to combating plastic pollution through art and education. Their mission is to build and exhibit aesthetically powerful art to educate a global audience about plastic pollution in oceans and waterways and to spark positive changes in consumer habits. In ten years, Washed Ashore has processed over 35 tons of plastic pollution from the Pacific Northwest’s ocean beaches to create over 85 works
of art that are awakening the hearts and minds of viewers to the global marine debris crisis.
Washed Ashore has exhibited their giant sculptures at many noteworthy venues including the Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History in Washington, The Kelly Clarkson Show, Disney and many Zoos, Aquariums and Botanical Gardens across the United States.

Name: Pinecrest Gardens
Description:
ABOUT PINECREST GARDENS
Pinecrest Gardens, with its lush landscapes, beautiful botanic gardens and buzzing community scene, welcomes over 150,000 local and international visitors each year. Formerly the beloved Parrot Jungle, the Village of Pinecrest acquired this South Florida gem in 2002, securing its place on the National Register of Historic Places in 2011. Today, Pinecrest Gardens provides a multifaceted venue for the arts, education, and environmental conservation. Beyond its rich history, it serves as both an entertainment destination and a picturesque backdrop for special occasions, spanning from weddings and bridal showers to corporate events. Committed to inclusivity, Pinecrest Gardens extends a warm invitation to visitors everywhere, offering a rich tapestry of events, workshops, and enlightening experiences designed to enthrall and educate.
 
Whether it's attending a live concert in the 530-seat amphitheater, wandering through 14 acres of botanical wonders punctuated by native wetlands, hardwood hammocks, and a serene cypress slough, playing on the new inclusive, ADA-accessible playground or participating in an art-centric festival or horticultural tour, there's always something to discover.

Name: Orientarium ZOO Łódź
Description:
Największy słoń indyjski w Europie i największe stado słoni w Polsce, zagrożone wyginięciem orangutany sumatrzańskie, gigantyczne krokodyle gawialowe, rzadko spotykane rekiny, najdłuższy tunel podwodny, Mini Zoo i moc atrakcji dla dzieci. Orientarium to najnowocześniejszy kompleks w Europie prezentujący faunę i florę Azji Południowo-Wschodniej.  

Obiekt jest czynny codziennie od 9:00 do 19:00 (kasy czynne godzinę krócej).

Name: Warszawskie ZOO
Description:
Miejski Ogród Zoologiczny im. Antoniny i Jana Żabińskich w Warszawie to zielona wyspa w sercu stolicy. Można tu przyjść po wiedzę, wypocząć pośród pięknej przyrody i obserwować wspaniałe zwierzęta. Na powierzchni 40 ha pięknego parku znajduje się ponad 12 000 zwierząt, reprezentujących około 500 gatunków, a wiele z nich objętych jest programami ratowania zwierząt zagrożonych wyginięciem. 
Ogród na warszawskiej Pradze został otwarty w 1928 r. i już wtedy był nowoczesną placówką, spełniającą ówczesne standardy hodowli zwierząt, służącą nauce i edukacji. Ogromnym sukcesem  hodowlanym tamtych lat były narodziny słonicy indyjskiej Tuzinki w 1937 roku (jedynego słonia urodzonego w Polsce). 
Od lat Warszawskie ZOO odnosi sukcesy w rozmnażaniu m.in.: gepardów, leniwców, pawi kongijskich, kangurów rudych, jeleni sika oraz wymarłych w naturze oryksów szablorogich. Potomstwo tych zwierząt zasila populacje w innych europejskich ogrodach zoologicznych.  
Stołeczny Ogród jest inicjatorem Dnia Misji Ogrodów Zoologicznych i Akwariów (który rokrocznie 11 marca przypomina, jaka jest rola współczesnych ogrodów zoologicznych) oraz Konkursu Zoologicznego IRBIS. 
Warszawskie ZOO pomaga chorym i rannym ptakom, które przyjmowane są w Ośrodku  Rehabilitacji Ptaków Chronionych „Ptasi Azyl”. Specjaliści zapewniają im opiekę weterynaryjną i możliwość powrotu do natury. Egzotycznymi płazami, gadami i bezkręgowcami, przejmowanymi w trakcie interwencji służb mundurowych, zajmuje się Centrum CITES. 
Na zwiedzających czekają całoroczne pawilony oraz Willa Żabińskich, gdzie w czasie II wojny światowej dyrektor stołecznego ogrodu - dr Jan Żabiński wraz z żoną Antoniną uratował kilkuset uciekinierów z warszawskiego  getta. Za tę działalność Państwo Żabińscy zostali odznaczeni Medalem Sprawiedliwych wśród Narodów Świata. Obecnie Willa jest udostępniona dla zwiedzających.
Stołeczny Ogród jest jednym z najchętniej odwiedzanych miejsc w stolicy.
Zapraszamy codziennie, zawsze od godz. 9:00.

Name: Zoo Solutions
Description: Our team brings decades of experience in creating and managing some of the world’s most renowned zoological parks and aquariums. We measure our success by the smiles of guests as they see animals thriving in the habitats we’ve designed.

Name: Rézoo
Description: Découvrez notre newsletter et notre annuaire d’experts zoologiques à partir de fin mars 2025.

Name: Zoo das Aves
Description: "Extrapolando o conceito de zoológico e focando na qualidade de vida e bem-estar dos animais e na educação ambiental, o Zoo das Aves iniciou suas atividades para o público em novembro de 2017 com um conceito de zooparque. Com um percurso de 1,5 km, o Zoo das Aves conta com quase 2.000 aves de aproximadamente 200 espécies distintas, e permite que os visitantes caminhem lado a lado com as aves nos recintos de imersão: Mata Atlântica, Amazônia, Fauna Africana, Pantanal e Morada das Araras. O parque oferece também recintos de aves aquáticas, emas, emus, aves do mundo, flamingos, antas, cervos e diversos outros animais. O passeio se completa na Zooloja e na cafeteria Quero Quero Café. Uma verdadeira experiência de cor, som e amor à natureza!"

Name: Parc Zoologique Ain Sebaâ
Description: Parc Zoologique Ain Sebâa

Name: Sardar Patel Zoological Park, Ekta Nagar
Description:
Sardar Patel Zoological Park, Ekta Nagar is located at the picturesque hills near the tallest statue of the world “The Statue of Unity” and “The Sardar Sarovar Dam” at Ekta Nagar. This zoo will take you through an adventurous and exciting trip of watching wildlife, enjoying scenic beauty of the hills and entertaining experiences of a lifetime. 

This Safari park covers 375 acres at seven different levels ranging from an altitude or elevation of 29 metres to 180 metres, on the right bank of the Narmada River, near Statue of Unity. The park is a home to more than 186 species of fauna, covering various biomes of Africa, Australia, Asia and America. Visitors will also be able to spot India’s endangered species, which includes the magnificent big cats such as Asiatic Lion, Royal Bengal Tiger and Leopard. The safari route has been designed such, that the visitors can view animal activities, spot reptiles and watch birds.

Name: Amis du jardin Dominique Villars
Description: Association du Jardin botanique et médicinale des Facultés de médecine et de Pharmacie de Grenoble.

Name: Hemsley Conservation Centre
Description:
Opening in August 2015, the HCC offers visitors the chance to see some of the world’s most endangered and least understood species! We work as part of a large network of zoos, large safari parks and wildlife centres around the world to ensure the survival of the species we care for.

We strongly believe that getting people closer to wildlife in a safe, fun, yet educational manner is the best way to inspire people about wild animals, their habitats and their conservation.

We’re also expanding and looking forward to welcoming a range of new animals and species to the centre in the coming months as well as brand new visitor facilities.

Name: Knies Kinderzoo Rapperswil
Description: Eintauchen in eine andere Welt! Unser Familien-Ausflugsziel ist täglich geöffnet und bietet spannende Erlebnisse im hautnahen Kontakt mit rund 350 Tierindividuen. Elefanten-, Kamel- und Ponyreiten sowie das Rösslitram gehören nebst einer täglichen Attraktion in Knies Zauberhut zu unseren unvergesslichen Erlebnissen. Unser Gastroteam setzt auf Regionalität und Frische, unsere Tierpfleger sind immer für unsere Gäste da, jeden Tag mit diversen Info-Angeboten und Führungen.

Name: Jardin d'Essai du Hamma
Description:
Le Jardin d'Essai du Hamma a été créé en 1832, couvre une superficie de 32 hectare clôturée.
il est localisé dans la partie Nord Est au fond de la baie d'Alger entre la mer Méditerranée au Nord et le Sanctuaire des martyres au Sud.

Name: Antwerp Zoo Foundation
Description: A world which former balance has been restored. In which endangered species can enjoy their reclaimed habitats once again in large numbers. In which people, animals, and nature live together in harmony without jeopardising one another’s existence in any way. Is that too good to be true? The Antwerp Zoo Foundation (AZF) does not believe so, even though time is running out. AZF aims to transform this hopeful vision of the future into reality.

Name: Oceanarium, Bournemouth
Description:
A tropical aquarium situated on Bournemouths golden mile of beachfront. 

Open 364 days a year and closed on Christmas Day.

Name: Lethal Chicken Games
Description:
Creators of the games What The Film?!, Camping with Sasquatch, Yeti Snowbrawl and Trash Dice with more to come! Check out our games at bigdiscoveries.com.

What The Film?! is a party game where players combine an ACTOR, PLOT and SET card to create their best movie pitch. Pitch to the table in 36 Seconds and vote for your favorite. But watch out for those backbiting friends. They may throw your pitch for a loop!

Camping with Sasquatch is a hybrid of rummy and slapjack. While the game is fun and cute and perfect for kids, it can be as brutally vindictive as you want it to be.

Yeti Snowbrawl is our newest game. Stack 10 snowballs to be declared the winner. But watch out for those Yeti picks, flicks and blows. Or maybe a full on snowbrawl fight will ensue. It's the perfect game for those you love...to throw things at.

Trash Dice. Roll. Collect. Avoid the trash. Trash Dice is a fast-paced two-person dice game. Compete against your opponent to complete a set of six dice. But be careful. Roll a duplicate number and get trashed!

Name: The Bentong Farm
Description:
Situated less than 10 minutes from Bentong Town and around one hour from KL City, it is a 27 acres multi attraction park with Petting Zoo as the main product. It is home to Alpacas, Green Peacock, Nyala, Pygmy Donkey, Pygmy Buffaloes, Giant Tortoises, Colourful Birds and many more tame farm and exotic animals. On top of that, there are also ATV rides, glamping and waterfall Monkey Spring in the planning to make it a complete must visit destination!

Apart from visiting the park as a walk-in customers, there are also group tour packages available. We are also looking to host other activities and events here including marketing collaborations, volunteer programs, team building, internship and many more.

I am also proud to announce that, recently, we were awarded 'The Best Agro Tourism Destination' by MATA and Santai Travel Magazine.

Please feel free to visit our social media pages, The Bentong Farm Malaysia for more pictures of our activities and attractions. Thank you again for all the support rendered to us all these years and looking forward to a fruitful year for all of us. Have a great day ahead!
 
FB   : https://www.facebook.com/thebentongfarm/?mibextid=ZbWKwL

Insta: https://instagram.com/thebentongfarmmalaysia?igshid=NDk5N2NlZjQ= 

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@thebentongfarmmy

Name: Aquarium de Montréal
Description:
L'Aquarium de Montréal, une installation de classe mondiale, dotée d’expositions fascinantes, d’activités participatives et d’expériences immersives qui ouvrira ses portes au Royalmount en 2024.

Notre mission est d'offrir une expérience unique et immersive aux visiteurs, en leur donnant accès à la diversité de la vie aquatique tout en les sensibilisant à l'importance des écosystèmes aquatiques entourant Montréal et ailleurs, et à notre responsabilité de les protéger.

Name: Attica Zoological Park S.A.
Description:
The Attica Zoological Park is the only zoo in Greece, receiving hundreds of thousands of visitors of all ages, every year, from all over the country.
 
The Attica Zoological Park was initially founded as a bird park in May 2000, hosting the world’s third largest collection of birds (1,100 birds from 300 different species). Striving to combine entertainment with education, it now offers visitors a unique journey to the five continents, through the lives of more than 2000 animals from 290 species, such as lions, Asian elephants, giraffes, monkeys, bears, penguins, parrots, dolphins and many more, in an area of over 20 hectares

Name: Lincolnshire Wildlife Park
Description: Lincolnshire Wildlife Park is the trading name for the Parrot Zoo Trust which is a registered charity in the UK. Offering long-term sanctuary to exotic animals, it is home to the UK's largest collection of Bengal Tigers and also houses the National Parrot Sanctuary and the National Turtle Sanctuary. LWP is an animal welfare charity open to the general public based out of Dickon Hill Road, Friskney, Boston, Lincolnshire, United Kingdom.

Name: Wellfield Botanic Gardens
Description:
Wellfield Botanic Gardens is ‘a living museum’ located at 1011 N. Main St., Elkhart, Indiana. Situated on the historic North Main Street well field, the Gardens are 36 acres in size, including 18 acres of water. The private, not-for-profit was created in 2005 to celebrate the inseparable relationship between water and life, inspire creativity and lifelong learning, foster stewardship of our natural world, and grow community. 
The garden is open year-round. Activities include special events and festivals, workshops and educational opportunities, a summer concert series, winter holiday lights, and seasonal programming. Facilities may be rented for private events including weddings, anniversaries, and celebrations of life.
For more information visit wellfieldgardens.org, email info@wellfieldgardens.org, or follow us on socials.

Name: Mediterraneo Marine Park
Description:
Nestled along Malta's coast, Mediterraneo Marine Park is a captivating haven showcasing the marvels of marine life. Spread across expansive landscapes, it welcomes visitors to an enchanting realm where dolphins gracefully navigate, sea lions entertain, and colorful birds captivate.

The park offers more than entertainment; it's an educational sanctuary. Dolphins and sea lions delight audiences while conveying critical conservation messages. Reptiles introduce guests to misunderstood species, highlighting their ecological significance.

Central to the park's ethos is education. Through interactive experiences, visitors gain insight into ocean conservation. Embracing sustainability, the park promotes eco-friendly practices for a harmonious coexistence with nature.

Tailored programs engage visitors of all ages, fostering a sense of responsibility towards marine preservation. Collaborations with global partners drive crucial research and conservation efforts, safeguarding endangered species and habitats.

Mediterraneo Marine Park stands as a beacon of our responsibility to protect our oceans. Departing visitors carry with them not just memories, but a commitment to advocate for marine conservation, ensuring a legacy of preserving our planet's marine

Name: Battersea Park Children's Zoo
Description:
Discover a vibrant array of wildlife at Battersea Park Children's Zoo attraction in London with conservation at the heart; from the exotic to the endangered, farm favourites to the more unusual.

Battersea Park Children's Zoo originally opened in 1951, but in In 2003 when government cutbacks and costly new European zoo regulations threatened Battersea Park Children's Zoo with closure, the Heap family (known for their wildlife conservation work and owners of the New Forest Wildlife Park) were approached by Wandsworth London Borough Council to take over the zoo. In 2005 Battersea Park Children's Zoo reopened with a focus on conservation, education and fun.

Name: Zoofari Parks, LLC
Description: Zoofari Parks, LLC owns and operates three zoological parks, Virginia Safari Park, Alabama Safari Park, Texas Zoofari Park and the Gulf Breeze Zoo. Conservation is fundamental in daily operations and guests to the parks are encouraged to join us in making a difference globally. Funding for conservation programs is made possible through the continued support of park guests. Zoofari Parks, LLC is privately owned and receives no state or federal tax support.

Name: Zoo de Santillana
Description:
El Zoo de Santillana abrió sus puertas en 1977 y sus objetivos han sido siempre los mismos desde el principio: la conservación de la naturaleza y la educación ambiental. Es miembro fundador de la Asociación Ibérica de Zoos y Acuarios (AIZA) y miembro de la Asociación Europea de Zoos y Acuarios (EAZA), donde se encuentran los zoológicos con un mayor compromiso con la naturaleza. Hoy en día, el Zoo de Santillana se ha convertido en una Reserva de la Biodiversidad y colabora en más de 40 programas de conservación de especies en peligro de extinción.

Podemos resaltar entre ellos, los Orangutanes de Sumatra (Pongo abelii) o las Panteras de las Nieves (Uncia uncia), ambos representantes únicos en España. Además participa en la conservación del Bisonte Europeo (Bison bonasus) o el Caballo de Przewalski (Equus przewalskii), ambas especies salvadas de la extinción por los zoos, reintroducidas en la naturaleza cuando se había perdido la esperanza para la supervivencia de la especie. Estas especies son la prueba viviente de que el valor conservacionista que han adquirido los zoos estas últimas décadas son claves para conservar la naturaleza tal y como la conocemos.

El Zoo de Santillana es además un enclave salvaje, donde la naturaleza ha encontrado su lugar, y muchas especies autóctonas encuentran en él refugio, en medio de la civilización. Visto desde arriba es un bosque denso, y esta vegetación alberga hábitats tan diferentes como el Jardín de Mariposas, la zona de primates con los Titíes de Sudamérica o los Lémures de Madagascar, los grandes aviarios, con grandes colonias de aves, o el Parque Cuaternario, donde especies del norte de Europa recrean el hábitat donde se desenvolvió el hombre de Altamira.

Name: Association des Amis du Jardin Botanique Universitaire de Strasbourg
Description:
L'Association des Amis du Jardin Botanique Universitaire de Strasbourg regroupe des amateurs/amatrices et professionnels de botanique, d'horticulture et de biologie des plantes pour partager leur passion, et soutenir par leurs actions le Jardin Botanique de Strasbourg. 
 Sorties botaniques 
 Sentiers botaniques
 Sciences participatives
 Visites de parcs et jardins 
 Valorisation du patrimoine
 Bourses aux plantes, fête des plantes

Name: Réserve Africaine de Sigean
Description: Située dans le sud de la France, entre Narbonne et Perpignan, sur la côte méditerranéenne et en bordure des étangs qui jalonnent le littoral languedocien, la Réserve Africaine de Sigean accueille plusieurs milliers d’animaux, sur une propriété de plus de 360 hectares. L’espace offert est suffisamment vaste pour que les animaux restent «sauvages» et expriment pleinement leurs comportements naturels.

Name: Stadtpark Mannheim gGmbH
Description:
Die Stadtpark Mannheim gemeinnützige GmbH ist eine Tochtergesellschaft der Stadt Mannheim.
Wir betreiben die Mannheimer Stadtparks Luisenpark und Herzogenriedpark, die zu
den beliebtesten Freizeiteinrichtungen der Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar und darüber hinaus zählen.
Im Luisenpark und im Herzogenriedpark werden tagtäglich rund 1300 Tiere und unzählige Pflanzen versorgt. Dazu bedarf es natürlich einer ausgefeilten Logistik, die viele Hände tatkräftig umsetzen. Pflanzen müssen gehegt und gepflegt werden – Aufgabe der Gärtner. Auch die Tierpfleger haben jede Menge zu tun.
Ob als Gärtner, Tierpfleger, Parkpädagoge oder in der Verwaltung als Veranstaltungstechniker oder in den Großbereichen Service und Sicherheit: Das Arbeiten im Luisenpark ist natürlich etwas Besonderes – mitten in der Stadt, und mitten in der Natur!
